i: MOKAS (Μονάδα Καταπολέμησης Αδικημάτων Συγκάλυψης / Unit for Combating Money Laundering) — Cyprus's financial intelligence unit. CySEC (Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission) — the securities and financial markets regulator. CBC (Central Bank of Cyprus) — the prudential supervisor of banks. Cyprus transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Cyprus hosts approximately 40 licensed banks and numerous investment firms. The Cyprus Investment Firms sector manages significant cross-border capital flows. CIFA (Cyprus Investment Funds Association) — the industry association representing investment fund managers.

CySEC — responsible for securities regulation and investment firm supervision. CBC (Central Bank of Cyprus) — conducts banking supervision and AML compliance monitoring. ICPAC — the professional body for accountants and auditors in Cyprus.

Βουλή των Αντιπροσώπων (House of Representatives) — unicameral parliament with 56 elected members (80 seats including 24 reserved for Turkish Cypriot community). Contact through parliament.cy. Cyprus is an EU加盟国 with robust democratic institutions. Moneyval (Council of Europe's Committee of Experts on the Evaluation of Anti-Money Laundering Measures) evaluates Cyprus's AML framework.

CZ.s: Central European industrial 経済 ($347B GDP) with strong manufacturing (19.9% GDP, automotive-dominated). Small coal sector (lignite in northern Bohemia). EU加盟国. Significant nuclear energy capacity (Dukovany, Temelín). サービス業がGDPの 60.2% GDP.

sectors.w: Czechia's lignite 鉱業 is concentrated in the Ústí nad Labem region (Sokolovská uhelná, Severní energetická). EU ETS carbon pricing makes Czech lignite uncompetitive — the 重複利益 between mine operators and local employment breaks when carbon costs exceed revenue.
bp: Align with EU ETS carbon pricing and eliminate free allowances for Czech lignite power. ...の場合 plants pay the full carbon price, lignite electricity becomes more expensive than alternatives and the 重複利益 breaks.
Mandatory 発電所ごとの 排出 and health-impact reporting. Czech lignite plants cause significant air pollution — publishing health costs per MWh makes W computable.
破壊不可能. Lignite combustion releases CO₂ and pollutants by physical process.
a: Report 排出 violations to ČIŽP (Czech Environmental Inspectorate)
Document health impacts in 鉱業 communities — report to regional public health authorities

i: ČIŽP (Česká inspekce životního prostředí / Czech Environmental Inspectorate) — the enforcement agency for 環境 law, conducting inspections and imposing 制裁. MŽP (Ministerstvo životního prostředí / Ministry of the Environment) — oversees 環境 policy. Zákon o ochraně oznamovatelů (Act on Protection of Whistleblowers, 2023) — Czech transposition of EU Whistleblower Directive.

ČEZ Group — Czechia's largest energy company (70% 国有), operating coal, nuclear, and renewable power plants. Sev.en Energy — the largest private lignite 鉱業 and power company. Sokolovská uhelná — operates lignite mines in the Sokolov basin.

ERÚ (Energetický regulační úřad / Energy Regulatory Office) — the independent エネルギー規制当局. Czech Coal Commission (Uhelná komise) — established to recommend a coal phase-out date. Recommended 2033, but implementation timelines remain debated.

Parlament České republiky — bicameral: Poslanecká sněmovna (200 members) and Senát (81 members). Contact through psp.cz and senat.cz. EU Just Transition Fund — Czechia is eligible for significant funding for coal-dependent regions.

DK.s: Advanced Nordic 経済 ($424.5B GDP) with global leadership in wind energy (Vestas, Ørsted). Intensive livestock agriculture (28M pigs for 5.8M people) creates significant nitrogen pollution. サービス業がGDPの 63.5% GDP. World's most ambitious climate law (70% reduction by 2030).

sectors.w: Denmark's intensive pig farming generates nitrogen pollution visible in marine dead zones (inner Danish waters, Baltic Sea). EU Nitrates Directive compliance data makes W computable from farm-level nitrogen balance sheets.
bp: 改革する agricultural subsidies to penalize nitrogen surplus per hectare. ...の場合 the 重複利益 between livestock producers and feed importers is broken by internalizing the nitrogen externality, intensive livestock becomes unprofitable without subsidy.

Mandatory farm-level nitrogen and phosphorus balance disclosure. Denmark already has one of Europe's most detailed agricultural data systems — extending to mandatory public disclosure makes W computable.

部分的に破壊可能. Intensive livestock inherently concentrates nutrients beyond ecosystem absorption. However, Denmark's leadership in biogas from manure demonstrates システム依存性 can be reduced through circular nutrient management.

i: Miljøstyrelsen — responsible for 環境 regulation including agricultural 排出 and water quality. Fødevarestyrelsen (Danish Veterinary and Food Administration) — oversees food safety and animal welfare. Danish Whistleblower Act (2021) — transposition of EU Directive 2019/1937.
Danish Crown — one of Europe's largest meat processors (farmer cooperative). Arla Foods — multinational dairy cooperative headquartered in Denmark. DLG Group — major agricultural input cooperative.

Miljøministeriet (Ministry of Environment) — 環境 policy including agricultural regulation. Landbrugsstyrelsen (Danish Agricultural Agency) — administers CAP payments. The 2021 green agriculture agreement is one of Europe's most ambitious.

Folketinget — unicameral parliament (179 members). Contact through ft.dk. Klimaloven (Climate Act, 2020) — legally binding 70% 排出 reduction target by 2030. HELCOM (Helsinki Commission) — the governing body of the Convention on the Protection of the Marine Environment of the Baltic Sea Area.

DO.s: Caribbean's largest 経済 ($124.3B GDP) with tourism, manufacturing (free trade zones), and 鉱業 (2.04% GDP — Pueblo Viejo gold mine, one of the world's largest). サービス業がGDPの 59.8% GDP. Climate vulnerable — hurricanes and sea level rise.

sectors.w: Pueblo Viejo gold mine (Barrick Gold) generates cyanide and mercury contamination risks. ...の場合 鉱山ごとの water quality and health data is published alongside production revenue, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: Mandate 環境 bonds that fully internalize mine closure and remediation costs. ...の場合 鉱業 companies pre-fund cleanup, ...における重複利益 extraction without 環境 accountability 弱まる.
Mandatory water quality monitoring and health-impact disclosure per mine. Publishing downstream contamination data makes W computable from 鉱業 revenue.
部分的に破壊可能. Open-pit 鉱業 disturbs landscapes. However, improved tailings management and water treatment can reduce システム依存性.

i: Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales — the environment ministry. Dirección General de Minería — the 鉱業 directorate under the Ministry of Energy and Mines. Defensor del Pueblo — the national ombudsman.
Barrick Gold — operates Pueblo Viejo, one of the world's largest gold mines (JV with Newmont). The mine produces ~800,000 ounces of gold annually.
Ministerio de Energía y Minas — oversees 鉱業 policy. Ley 146-71 (Mining Law) — governs 鉱業 concessions and 環境 obligations.
Congreso Nacional — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (190 members) and Senado (32 members). The Dominican Republic is a presidential 民主主義.

DZ.s: Major oil and gas producer ($269.3B GDP) with 22.46% combined oil and gas rents. Sonatrach is Africa's largest company. Economy heavily dependent on hydrocarbon exports (90%+ of export revenue). 農業がGDPの 14% GDP (primarily wheat and dates). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Algeria's oil production is declining from mature Hassi Messaoud and Hassi R'Mel fields. As domestic energy consumption grows (population of 45M+), the exportable surplus shrinks. ...の場合 production costs exceed export revenue minus domestic consumption, ...における重複利益 continued expansion breaks.
bp: Redirect hydrocarbon revenues to solar energy (Algeria has the Sahara — one of Earth's highest solar irradiance zones). ...の場合 solar electricity is cheaper than burning domestically-consumed gas, ...における重複利益 gas-fired power generation breaks.
実施する 油田ごとの 排出 disclosure for Sonatrach operations. Algeria's massive gas flaring (visible from satellite) makes 環境 damage measurable — publishing this data makes W computable.
破壊不可能 by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.

i: Sonatrach — Algeria's state oil and gas company, Africa's largest company by revenue. Sonatrach controls all upstream and downstream petroleum operations. Note: Algeria has limited press freedom and no comprehensive 内部告発者 protection. Independent reporting is constrained.
Sonatrach operates the world's longest natural gas pipelines (Transmed to Italy, MEG to Spain). Eni, TotalEnergies, Equinor, Occidental — major international partners in Algerian upstream operations.

ALNAFT (Agence Nationale pour la Valorisation des Ressources en Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons regulatory agency managing licensing. CREG (Commission de Régulation de l'Électricité et du Gaz) — the electricity and gas regulatory commission. ARH (Autorité de Régulation des Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons sector regulator.

Note: Algeria is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The Assemblée populaire nationale (407 members) and Conseil de la Nation (174 members) do not function as independent democratic institutions. International channels: OPEC membership, Mediterranean dialogue (Union for the Mediterranean), African Union, Arab League. Algeria's strategic gas supply position (supplier to Italy, Spain via pipeline) gives it leverage in energy transition negotiations.

EC.s: Oil-dependent 経済 ($124.7B GDP) with 6.41% oil rents. PetroEcuador manages state interests. Extraordinary biodiversity (Galápagos, Amazon basin). The 2008 Constitution grants 'rights of nature' (Pachamama). 農業がGDPの 9.5% GDP (bananas, shrimp, cacao).

sectors.w: Ecuador's 2023 referendum voted to ban oil extraction in Yasuní National Park (one of the world's most biodiverse areas). This democratic decision to forgo extraction directly breaks the 重複利益. Extending this precedent to other sensitive areas accelerates the transition.
bp: 実施する the Yasuní referendum result (ban extraction in ITT block) and extend the precedent to other ecologically sensitive areas. ...の場合 democratic decisions override extraction interests, the 重複利益 breaks through civic action.
Mandate per-block 環境 impact disclosure for all PetroEcuador and private operator fields. Ecuador's 環境 data (Amazon 森林破壊, water contamination from legacy Texaco/Chevron operations) makes W measurable.
破壊不可能 by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.

i: MAATE (Ministerio del Ambiente, Agua y Transición Ecológica) — Ecuador's environment ministry. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman. Ecuador's 2008 Constitution (Articles 71-74) grants legally enforceable rights to nature (Pachamama), a global first.

EP PetroEcuador — the state oil company. PetroAmazonas EP — manages upstream operations in the Amazon basin. The Lago Agrio case (Chevron/Texaco) — one of the world's largest 環境 lawsuits over oil contamination in the Ecuadorian Amazon.
ARCERNNR (Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables) — the energy and natural resources regulatory agency.

Asamblea Nacional del Ecuador — unicameral parliament (137 members). Contact through asambleanacional.gob.ec. Ecuador's rights of nature framework (2008 Constitution) and the 2023 Yasuní referendum are globally significant legal precedents for 環境 governance.

EE.s: Advanced digital 経済 ($43.1B GDP) with unique oil shale dependence (0.96% oil rents from kukersite extraction). Services-dominant (65.7% GDP). EU and NATO member. World leader in e-governance. Oil shale power generation is Estonia's largest source of CO₂ 排出.

sectors.w: Estonia's oil shale sector is concentrated in Ida-Viru county (Eesti Energia/Enefit). EU ETS carbon costs make oil shale electricity the most expensive fossil option. ...の場合 carbon pricing fully applies, the 重複利益 between shale operators and electricity consumers breaks.
bp: Full EU ETS alignment without compensation. Oil shale electricity already costs more than wind in the Baltic. ...の場合 subsidies and free allowances are eliminated, ...における重複利益 oil shale generation breaks — renewables are cheaper.
Mandatory 発電所ごとの lifecycle 排出 and health-impact disclosure for oil shale processing. Estonia's detailed 環境 monitoring makes W computable.
破壊不可能. Oil shale processing releases CO₂, particulate matter, and phenolic wastewater by physical and chemical process.

i: Keskkonnaamet (Environmental Board) — Estonia's 環境 enforcement and permitting authority. Keskkonnaministeerium (Ministry of the Environment) — oversees 環境 policy. Estonia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Eesti Energia (Enefit) — the 国有 energy company and dominant oil shale operator. Enefit operates the Narva power plants (the largest oil shale power plants in the world) and oil shale processing facilities.
Konkurentsiamet (Competition Authority) — also serves as Estonia's エネルギー規制当局. Ida-Viru county hosts ~90% of Estonia's oil shale operations and faces significant economic transition challenges.

Riigikogu — Estonia's unicameral parliament (101 members). Contact through riigikogu.ee. Estonia's Climate Ambition target includes significant 排出 reduction from the energy sector. EU Just Transition Fund — Estonia receives JTF funding for Ida-Viru transition.

EG.s: Largest Arab 経済 by population ($389.1B GDP). Oil and gas rents at 5.04%. Major gas producer (Zohr field, Mediterranean). 農業がGDPの 13.7% GDP. High military expenditure. Hosted COP27. Suez Canal provides strategic global trade leverage.

sectors.w: Egypt's Zohr gas field (discovered 2015) transformed Egypt from gas importer to exporter. COP27 presidency created domestic pressure for 排出 透明性. Per-field 排出 disclosure makes W computable.
bp: Redirect gas export revenue to solar energy development. Egypt's solar irradiance is among the world's highest. ...の場合 solar electricity undercuts gas-fired generation domestically, ...における重複利益 gas-for-domestic-power 弱まる.
実施する 油田ごとの 排出 disclosure for Zohr and other major fields. Egypt's COP27 commitments create institutional pressure — making lifecycle 排出 visible per unit of production makes W computable.
破壊不可能 by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.

i: EEAA (Egyptian Environmental Affairs Agency) — Egypt's 環境 regulatory body. EGPC (Egyptian General Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil and gas company. EGAS (Egyptian Natural Gas Holding Company) — manages natural gas operations. Note: Egypt has severe restrictions on 市民社会 and press freedom. Whistleblower protections are minimal.
Eni — operates Zohr, the largest gas field in the Mediterranean. BP — major operator in the West Nile Delta. EGPC and EGAS manage state interests in all petroleum operations.

Ministry of Petroleum and Mineral Resources — oversees hydrocarbons policy. NREA (New and Renewable Energy Authority) — responsible for 再生可能エネルギー development. Egypt's Integrated Sustainable Energy Strategy targets 42% renewable electricity by 2035.

Note: Egypt under President el-Sisi is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The House of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 596 members) does not function as an independent democratic institution. International channels: Arab League, African Union (Egypt hosted AU in 2019), Union for the Mediterranean, COP27 legacy initiatives.

ET.s: Africa's second-most-populous country ($149.7B GDP). Agriculture dominates (34.8% GDP, primarily coffee, teff, livestock). Rapid industrialization drive (industrial parks). Major hydropower (GERD — Grand Ethiopian Renaissance Dam). Post-civil war recovery.

sectors.w: Ethiopia's agricultural expansion is the primary driver of 森林破壊 (fr=5.6% GDP equivalent in forest rents). ...の場合 per-farm 環境 data (tree cover, soil carbon) is linked to agricultural output, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: Scale Ethiopia's Productive Safety Net Program (PSNP) to include 環境 conditionality. ...の場合 agricultural support payments require soil conservation and tree planting, ...における重複利益 clearing forest for short-term cultivation 弱まる.
Satellite-based monitoring of forest cover and 土壌劣化 published at woreda level. Ethiopia's Green Legacy Initiative provides political commitment — mandatory monitoring data makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Subsistence agriculture on degraded land inherently affects soil and water systems. However, Ethiopia's traditional conservation agriculture (terracing, agroforestry) can reduce システム依存性.

i: Regional 環境 protection authorities — Ethiopia's federal system devolves 環境 management to regional states. EHRC (Ethiopian Human Rights Commission) — the national human rights institution. 策定するment Agents (DAs) — government agricultural extension workers deployed at kebele (ward) level throughout rural Ethiopia.

ECX (Ethiopian Commodity Exchange) — the commodities trading platform for coffee, sesame, and other agricultural products. Ethiopia is Africa's largest coffee producer and coffee is the country's largest export. Industrial parks development corporation — manages Ethiopia's growing manufacturing sector.

Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy and the PSNP. EFCCC (Environment, Forest and Climate Change Commission) — Ethiopia's 環境当局. Green Legacy Initiative — the government's flagship reforestation program targeting 20 billion seedlings.

Note: Ethiopia is a federal 議院内閣制 republic but democratic governance has been constrained by civil conflict (Tigray war 2020-2022). The House of Peoples' Representatives (547 members) is the lower house. International channels: African Union (HQ in Addis Ababa), Nile Basin Initiative, IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on 策定するment), AFR100 (Africa's contribution to the Bonn Challenge on forest restoration).

FI.s: Advanced Nordic 経済 ($298.7B GDP) with strong forestry sector. サービス業がGDPの 62.2% GDP, manufacturing at 14.2%. High healthcare expenditure (10.47% GDP). Major pulp and paper producers (UPM, Stora Enso, Metsä Group). EU加盟国 with robust 環境 regulation.

sectors.w: Finland's forestry-driven monoculture (pine/spruce plantations replacing natural forests) reduces biodiversity and degrades peatland carbon stocks. ...の場合 per-harvest biodiversity and carbon data is published alongside timber revenue, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: 改革する EU CAP and national forestry subsidies to reward biodiversity and carbon storage rather than timber volume. ...の場合 subsidies incentivize continuous-cover forestry over clear-cutting, ...における重複利益 plantation monoculture 弱まる.

Mandatory per-harvest 環境 data (biodiversity indicators, soil carbon, water quality). Finland's Metsähallitus (state forest enterprise) already collects extensive data — making it publicly accessible makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Timber plantation inherently reduces biodiversity compared to natural forest. However, continuous-cover forestry and extended rotation lengths can significantly reduce システム依存性.

i: ELY-keskus — regional authorities responsible for 環境 monitoring and enforcement. SYKE (Suomen ympäristökeskus / Finnish Environment Institute) — the national 環境 research and monitoring institute. Ilmoittajansuojelulaki (Whistleblower Protection Act, 2023) — Finnish transposition of EU Whistleblower Directive.

UPM-Kymmene — one of Finland's largest forestry companies. Stora Enso — Finnish-Swedish forestry and paper company. Metsä Group — cooperative of 100,000+ Finnish forest owners. Metsähallitus — state enterprise managing one-third of Finland's land area.

MMM (Maa- ja metsätalousministeriö) — the ministry responsible for agriculture and forestry policy. National Forest Strategy 2025 — Finland's strategic framework for forestry sector development. EU Nature Restoration Law — requires restoration of degraded ecosystems including forests.

Eduskunta (Parliament of Finland) — unicameral legislature with 200 members. Contact through eduskunta.fi. The Maa- ja metsätalousvaliokunta (Agriculture and Forestry Committee) handles forestry legislation. Finland's climate law targets carbon neutrality by 2035.

GA.s: Oil-dependent Central African 経済 ($20.9B GDP) with 15.83% combined oil and gas rents. 88% forest cover — one of the world's most forested countries. Low population (2.4M). Military coup August 2023 ended the Bongo family's 55-year rule.

sectors.w: Gabon's oil production is in terminal decline from mature fields (peaked at ~370,000 bpd in 1997, now ~200,000). As production falls, the 重複利益 between operators and government revenue 弱まる. Gabon's forests offer alternative revenue through carbon credits.
bp: Monetize Gabon's forest carbon stocks through REDD+ and voluntary carbon markets. Gabon received $17M from Norway for forest protection in 2021 — scaling this replaces declining oil revenue and breaks ...における重複利益 extraction.
実施する 油田ごとの 排出 disclosure for all operators (TotalEnergies, Perenco, Assala Energy). Making 環境 costs visible makes W computable.

GE.s: Small South Caucasus 経済 ($34.2B GDP) with 鉱業 sector (1.28% GDP, primarily manganese and copper). Services-dominant (62% GDP). EU加盟候補国 country (2023). Significant hydropower potential. Political tensions between pro-EU and pro-Russia orientations.

sectors.w: Georgia's manganese 鉱業 (Chiatura) and copper 鉱業 generate significant water pollution. EU accession 環境 alignment will require improved monitoring. ...の場合 water quality data is linked to 鉱業 output, Wが計算可能になる.

部分的に破壊可能. Mining disturbs landscapes, but improved tailings management can reduce システム依存性.

Advocate for Energy Community Treaty enforcement on 環境 standards

i: NEA (National Environmental Agency) — responsible for 環境 monitoring, permitting, and enforcement. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Agriculture — oversees 環境 and agricultural policy. Georgia's Law on Freedom of Speech and Expression provides some protections for reporting.

Georgian Manganese — subsidiary of ERG (Eurasian Resources Group), operating the Chiatura manganese mines. RMG Copper — operates copper mines. Georgia's 鉱業 sector is primarily controlled by international investors.
National Agency of Mines — responsible for 鉱業 licensing and oversight. Georgia's EU Association Agreement (2014) includes provisions for 環境 alignment.

Sakartvelos Parlamenti (Parliament of Georgia) — unicameral legislature with 150 members. Contact through parliament.ge. Georgia is an EU加盟候補国 country (2023) and aspirant to full EU加盟国ship. EU Association Agreement — includes Deep and Comprehensive Free Trade Area (DCFTA) with 環境 provisions.

GH.s: West African 経済 ($82.3B GDP) with significant oil (4.06% rents), gold 鉱業 (5.17% mineral rents), and cocoa agriculture (20.9% ag share). One of Africa's most stable democracies. Debt crisis (2022 IMF bailout). Illegal artisanal gold 鉱業 (galamsey) is a major 環境 crisis.

sectors.w: Ghana's galamsey (illegal artisanal 鉱業) crisis has contaminated water bodies across cocoa-growing regions. ...の場合 鉱山ごとの water quality data is published and linked to gold production, Wが計算可能になる. The galamsey problem is so severe that it threatens Ghana's water supply.
bp: Formalize artisanal 鉱業 with 環境 standards and alternative livelihood programs. ...の場合 legal small-scale 鉱業 provides comparable income with less 環境 damage, ...における重複利益 illegal extraction 弱まる.
Satellite-based water quality monitoring linked to 鉱業 areas. Ghana's Water Resources Commission already monitors water quality — extending to real-time public data makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Mining disturbs landscapes. However, formalized artisanal 鉱業 with mercury-free processing (e.g., gravity separation) can significantly reduce システム依存性.

Document water contamination — report to WRC (Water Resources Commission)
Report through the Minerals Commission complaint mechanisms
Gold Fields, Newmont, AngloGold Ashanti: Support formalization of artisanal 鉱業 near concessions
実施する community development agreements per Ghana's 鉱業 law
採用する mercury-free processing technology transfer programs
Minerals Commission: Accelerate small-scale 鉱業 formalization with 環境 standards
EPA (Environmental Protection Agency): 強化する enforcement against water pollution from 鉱業
Forestry Commission: Protect forest reserves from galamsey encroachment
あなたの代表者に連絡してください： Member of Parliament を要求する emergency action on the galamsey water contamination crisis
Support EITI enhanced reporting with 環境 metrics
を通じて提唱する： ECOWAS for regional artisanal 鉱業 regulation
を推進する： Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury use in gold 鉱業
i: IMCIM (Inter-Ministerial Committee on Illegal Mining) — established to coordinate government response to the galamsey crisis. WRC (Water Resources Commission) — manages Ghana's water resources and monitors water quality. Minerals Commission — the regulatory body for the 鉱業 sector, responsible for licensing and compliance monitoring.
Gold Fields — operates Tarkwa and Damang mines. Newmont — operates Ahafo and Akyem mines. AngloGold Ashanti — major gold 鉱業 company with Ghanaian operations. Ghana is Africa's largest gold producer.

EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Ghana) — responsible for 環境 permitting, monitoring, and enforcement. Forestry Commission — manages Ghana's forest reserves, many of which are threatened by illegal 鉱業. EITI Ghana — Ghana has been EITI compliant since 2010.

Parliament of Ghana — unicameral legislature with 275 members. Contact through parliament.gh. Ghana is a presidential 民主主義 with peaceful transfers of power. Minamata Convention on Mercury — Ghana has ratified this treaty requiring phase-down of mercury use in artisanal gold 鉱業.

GN.s: Resource-rich West African 経済 ($25B GDP) with massive bauxite reserves (world's largest — 7.4B tons). 農業がGDPの 31% GDP. Military junta since 2021 coup. Guinea supplies ~25% of global bauxite (the ore used to produce aluminum).

sectors.w: Guinea's bauxite 鉱業 displaces communities and contaminates water sources. As aluminum buyers face ESG pressure (EU CSRD, Apple/Tesla supply chain requirements), making 鉱山ごとの 環境 data visible breaks system independence.
bp: International supply chain due diligence (EU CSDDD) requiring 環境 and human rights compliance for bauxite. ...の場合 buyers must verify mine-level conditions, ...における重複利益 low-cost, unregulated extraction 弱まる.
Per-mine 環境 and community impact disclosure through EITI and supply chain traceability. ...の場合 downstream manufacturers can see the welfare cost per ton of bauxite, Wが計算可能になる.
部分的に破壊可能. Open-pit bauxite 鉱業 inherently disturbs landscapes. However, progressive rehabilitation and dust suppression can reduce システム依存性.
a: Report 環境 violations to international monitoring organizations (Human Rights Watch, Inclusive 策定するment International)
Document community displacement — report through international accountability mechanisms
Report through 鉱業 company compliance channels (Rio Tinto, Alcoa, Emirates Global Aluminium)
CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée), SMB (Société Minière de Boké): 実施する community resettlement standards per IFC Performance Standard 5
採用する ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) certification
に投資する progressive rehabilitation of mined areas
Ministry of Mines: 施行する 2011 Mining Code 環境 provisions
CPDM (Centre de Promotion et de Développement Minier): 強化する 環境 monitoring capacity
EITI Guinea: Expand reporting to 環境 and community data

Support EU CSDDD implementation requiring due diligence for bauxite imports from Guinea
を推進する： ASI certification as condition for international bauxite purchases
Support international accountability mechanisms for 鉱業-affected communities
i: Note: Guinea is under military rule (CNRD — Comité National du Rassemblement et du Développement) since September 2021. Independent 市民社会 operates under severe constraints. Bureau Guinéen des Études et Évaluations Environnementales (BGEEE) — 環境 assessment authority. International monitoring: Human Rights Watch and Inclusive 策定するment International have documented impacts of bauxite 鉱業 on Guinean communities.

CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée) — JV of Alcoa, Rio Tinto, and Dadco, one of the world's largest bauxite producers. SMB (Société Minière de Boké) — Chinese-backed consortium (includes Winning International, Shandong Weiqiao). GAC (Guinea Alumina Corporation) — Emirates Global Aluminium subsidiary. ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) — the industry sustainability standard for the aluminum value chain.

Ministère des Mines et de la Géologie — oversees 鉱業 policy and licensing. Code Minier (2011, revised 2013) — Guinea's 鉱業 code establishing 環境 obligations. EITI Guinea — Guinea has been EITI compliant, publishing reports on 鉱業 revenues.

Note: Guinea's democratic institutions are suspended under military rule. The Conseil National de la Transition (CNT) serves as a transitional legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Guinea suspended), African Union, international 鉱業 company home-country oversight (UK, Canada, UAE, China). EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive (CSDDD) — will require EU companies to address human rights and 環境 impacts in their supply chains.

GQ.s: Small petrostate ($12.8B GDP) with 21.57% combined oil and gas rents. One of Africa's highest per-capita GDPs but extreme inequality. Authoritarian rule (Obiang family since 1979 — world's longest-serving head of state). Oil production declining from mature fields.

sectors.w: Equatorial Guinea's oil production has declined ~75% from peak. As fields deplete, the 重複利益 between operators and government revenue 弱まる. Without new discoveries, the economic case for diversification becomes unavoidable.
bp: Economic diversification as oil depletes. ...の場合 production revenue falls below government operating costs, ...における重複利益 continued extraction from depleting fields breaks — alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-field 排出 disclosure through international operator reporting (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil). Making 環境 costs visible makes W computable.
破壊不可能 by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report through international operator compliance channels (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil)

Report corruption to US DOJ (several Obiang family members have faced kleptocracy investigations)

i: Note: Equatorial Guinea is one of the world's most 権威主義 states. No independent media, 市民社会, or labor organizations exist. EG LNG (Equatorial Guinea LNG Holdings) — operates the LNG processing plant. International engagement: US Department of Justice Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Initiative has investigated Obiang family assets. Transparency International consistently ranks Equatorial Guinea among the most corrupt countries.
ExxonMobil — the largest oil operator in Equatorial Guinea. Marathon Oil — operates in offshore blocks. GEPetrol — the state national oil company.

Ministry of Mines and Hydrocarbons — oversees oil and gas operations. Note: Equatorial Guinea was suspended from EITI in 2010 for insufficient progress on 透明性. BEAC (central bank of CEMAC zone) provides limited macroeconomic oversight.

Note: Equatorial Guinea under President Obiang (in power since 1979) has no democratic institutions. The Cámara de Representantes del Pueblo and Senate are rubber-stamp bodies. International channels: CEMAC, African Union, UN Human Rights Council. Several countries (US, France, Switzerland) have pursued legal action against Obiang family members for corruption and money laundering.

GR.s: EU 経済 ($256.2B GDP) with dominant services sector (68% GDP, tourism-heavy). Low resource extraction. Post-debt-crisis recovery. Major shipping industry (Greek-owned fleet is the world's largest). 農業がGDPの 3.8% GDP (olives, wine).

sectors.w: Greece's Mediterranean diet is being displaced by UPF consumption, contributing to rising obesity (Greece has one of Europe's highest childhood obesity rates). ...の場合 diet-related healthcare costs are published per product category through EOPYY health insurance data, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: 実施する front-of-pack health labelling to make welfare costs visible to consumers. ...の場合 UPF health costs are visible at point of sale, the 重複利益 between processors and retailers in high-margin UPF 弱まる.

EOPYY (National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) publication of diet-attributable disease costs per food category. Greece's national health system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. 改革するulation mandates can reduce システム依存性.

i: EFET (ΕΦΕΤ — Ενιαίος Φορέας Ελέγχου Τροφίμων / Hellenic Food Authority) — Greece's food safety authority. Greece transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

SEVT (Σύνδεσμος Ελληνικών Βιομηχανιών Τροφίμων / Federation of Hellenic Food Industries) — the food industry trade association. Greece's traditional food sector (olive oil, dairy, honey) provides a competitive alternative to UPF.

Ministry of Health — oversees health policy. EOPYY (Εθνικός Οργανισμός Παροχής Υπηρεσιών Υγείας / National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) — the national health insurer managing healthcare expenditure data.
Βουλή των Ελλήνων (Hellenic Parliament) — unicameral legislature with 300 members. Contact through hellenicparliament.gr. Greece is a 議院内閣制 民主主義 and EU加盟国.

GT.s: Central American 経済 ($113.2B GDP) with agriculture at 9.8% GDP (coffee, sugar, palm oil). Mining at 1.12% GDP (gold, silver — Marlin mine controversy). High inequality and indigenous population (40%+). Remittances significant (~18% of GDP).

sectors.w: Guatemala's palm oil expansion into Petén and Alta Verapaz drives 森林破壊 and displaces indigenous communities. ...の場合 per-farm 森林破壊 data is linked to palm oil exports (EUDR compliance), Wが計算可能になる.
bp: EU Deforestation Regulation compliance requiring farm-level traceability. ...の場合 palm oil exports must prove zero-森林破壊 origin, ...における重複利益 clearing forest for plantations breaks.

Mandatory per-farm 環境 data (tree cover, water use, pesticide application). Guatemala's CONAP (National Council for Protected Areas) can provide monitoring data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. However, agroforestry integration and RSPO certification can reduce システム依存性.

i: CONAP (Consejo Nacional de Áreas Protegidas) — manages Guatemala's protected areas. INAB (Instituto Nacional de Bosques) — the national forest institute. PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos) — the national human rights ombudsman. Guatemala has significant challenges with 環境 defender safety.

REPSA (Reforestadora de Palma del Petén) — major palm oil producer. GREPALMA (Gremial de Palmicultores de Guatemala) — the palm oil producers' association. RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable パーム油) — the international certification standard.
MARN (Ministerio de Ambiente y Recursos Naturales) — Guatemala's environment ministry. MAGA (Ministerio de Agricultura, Ganadería y Alimentación) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso de la República de Guatemala — unicameral legislature with 160 members. Guatemala has ratified ILO Convention 169 on indigenous peoples' rights. The Inter-American Court of Human Rights has issued rulings on indigenous land rights in Guatemala.

GY.s: Fastest-growing 経済 globally ($24.7B GDP, up from $5.5B in 2019) due to massive offshore oil discoveries (Stabroek block). 石油レント at 22.08%, 鉱業 at 9.38% (gold, bauxite). Small population (800K). At risk of 'resource curse' — extraordinary PST exposure from rapid petro-development.

sectors.w: Guyana's 2016 production sharing agreement with ExxonMobil has been widely criticized for giving the government only 2% royalty + 50% profit oil (after cost recovery). ...の場合 the full fiscal terms and 環境 costs are disclosed and understood, Wが計算可能になる from production data.
bp: Renegotiate the Stabroek PSA fiscal terms to capture a fair share of petroleum wealth. ...の場合 Guyana's government share approaches international norms (60-80% government take), ...における重複利益 an extractive-favorable contract 弱まる.
Mandatory 油田ごとの 排出 disclosure and 環境 monitoring for all Stabroek block operations. ExxonMobil already reports global 排出 — extending to 油田ごとの Guyana data makes W computable.
破壊不可能 by policy alone. Offshore oil production and combustion release CO₂.
a: Report 環境 violations to EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana)
Document compliance gaps in Stabroek operations — report through ExxonMobil compliance channels
Report fiscal irregularities to the Audit Office of Guyana
ExxonMobil, Hess, CNOOC (Stabroek partners): 実施する 油田ごとの 排出 disclosure for Guyana operations
採用する zero-flaring targets
に投資する oil spill response capacity (current capacity is minimal for deepwater operations)
EPA: 強化する 環境 monitoring capacity for offshore operations
Ministry of Natural Resources: Commission independent review of Stabroek PSA terms
Natural Resource Fund Board: 実施する transparent investment and withdrawal rules

Support establishment of a properly resourced Petroleum Commission as independent regulator
Advocate for Natural Resource Fund 透明性 aligned with Santiago Principles for sovereign wealth funds

i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana) — responsible for 環境 permitting and monitoring of oil and gas operations. Ministry of Natural Resources — oversees petroleum policy. Audit Office of Guyana — conducts financial audits of government revenue management. Note: Guyana's regulatory capacity is severely under-resourced relative to the scale of oil development.

ExxonMobil (45%), Hess (30%), CNOOC (25%) — the Stabroek block partnership. Production began in 2019 and is expected to reach 1.2 million bpd by 2027. The Stabroek Production Sharing Agreement (2016) — governs fiscal terms. The Natural Resource Fund — Guyana's sovereign wealth fund established in 2019 to manage oil revenues.
Natural Resource Fund Act (2021) — governs the sovereign wealth fund. The Petroleum Commission (planned) — intended to serve as the independent petroleum regulator, but not yet fully established.

National Assembly of Guyana — unicameral legislature with 65 members. Guyana is a cooperative republic with Westminster-style 議院内閣制 民主主義. The Natural Resource Governance Institute (NRGI) provides technical assistance on petroleum governance. CARICOM — provides regional coordination.

HK.s: Global financial center ($406.9B GDP) with 91.8% services. Major banking and securities hub. Under Chinese sovereignty since 1997 with eroding autonomy. Significant financial intermediation — Hong Kong Stock Exchange is 5th-largest globally by market cap.

sectors.w: Hong Kong intermediates massive capital flows including fossil fuel financing. ...の場合 Scope 3 financed 排出 are disclosed per financial institution, Wが計算可能になる from financial transaction data.
bp: Mandatory financed 排出 disclosure for all HKEX-listed financial institutions. ...の場合 banks must disclose the 排出 their lending supports, ...における重複利益 fossil fuel financing 弱まる — ESG-aware investors reallocate.
HKMA Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group implementation. Making climate risk visible in financial products makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Financial intermediation can relocate. But Hong Kong's infrastructure and China market access create switching costs.
a: Report greenwashing to SFC (Securities and Futures Commission)
Document ESG disclosure violations — report to HKEX listing division
Report through internal bank compliance channels
採用する TCFD-aligned disclosure across all operations
Set financed 排出 reduction targets
Integrate climate risk into lending decisions

SFC: 施行する enhanced ESG disclosure for listed companies
HKEX: 強化する climate-related listing requirements
を通じて提唱する： IOSCO for global securities regulator coordination on climate disclosure
Support ISSB sustainability reporting standards adoption in Hong Kong

Leverage Hong Kong's role as a Belt and Road financing hub to require climate standards
i: SFC (Securities and Futures Commission) — regulates securities, futures markets, and listed companies. HKEX (Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing) — operates the stock exchange and sets listing rules including ESG disclosure requirements. HKMA (Hong Kong Monetary Authority) — the de facto central bank. Note: Under the National Security Law (2020), civil liberties are constrained.

Major banks in Hong Kong: HSBC, Standard Chartered, Bank of China (Hong Kong), Hang Seng Bank. Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group — coordinates climate finance policy across HKMA, SFC, and other regulators.
HKMA — supervises 160+ licensed banks. The HKMA's Climate Risk Management Supervisory Policy Manual (2021) sets expectations for banks' climate risk management.

Note: Hong Kong's Legislative Council (90 members) is not freely elected under the 2021 electoral reform. International engagement operates through financial regulatory cooperation (IOSCO, BIS, NGFS) and Hong Kong's role as an international financial center.

HN.s: Lower-middle-income 経済 ($37.1B GDP) with agriculture at 11.2% GDP (coffee, palm oil, bananas). 製造業がGDPの 14.9% (maquiladora sector). Climate-vulnerable — Hurricane Mitch (1998) and Eta/Iota (2020). High emigration. Environmental defenders face severe threats.

sectors.w: Honduras's palm oil expansion drives 森林破壊 in the Aguán Valley and Mosquitia region. EUDR compliance will require farm-level traceability — when 森林破壊 is linked to specific supply chains, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-森林破壊 traceability for palm oil exports. ...の場合 buyers must verify origin, ...における重複利益 forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Satellite-based 森林破壊 monitoring linked to agricultural export data. ICF (Forest Conservation Institute) data makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. RSPO certification and agroforestry can reduce システム依存性.

Document land rights violations — report to CONADEH (Comisionado Nacional de los Derechos Humanos)

i: ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal) — responsible for forest management and conservation. CONADEH — the national human rights commissioner. Note: Honduras is one of the most dangerous countries for 環境 defenders — Global Witness documents multiple killings annually.

Corporación Dinant — Honduras's largest palm oil producer (implicated in Aguán Valley land conflicts). Jaremar — another major palm oil company. IFC (International Finance Corporation) — has faced accountability complaints regarding investments in Honduran palm oil.
MiAmbiente+ (Secretaría de Recursos Naturales y Ambiente) — Honduras's environment ministry. SAG (Secretaría de Agricultura y Ganadería) — the agriculture ministry.
Congreso Nacional de Honduras — unicameral legislature with 128 members. Honduras is a presidential 民主主義. SICA (Sistema de la Integración Centroamericana) — the Central American integration system.

HR.s: EU and Eurozone member ($93B GDP) with dominant services sector (60.8% GDP, tourism-heavy). Small oil sector (INA, partially owned by MOL). 農業がGDPの 2.9% GDP. Joined the euro and Schengen in 2023.

sectors.w: Croatia's EU-integrated health insurance system (HZZO) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs per product category makes W computable from retail sales data.
bp: 実施する EU front-of-pack health labelling. Makes welfare costs visible to consumers.
HZZO publication of diet-attributable healthcare cost data. Croatia's universal health insurance generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. 改革するulation mandates reduce システム依存性.

i: HAH (Hrvatska agencija za hranu / Croatian Food Agency) — food safety authority. AZTN (Agencija za zaštitu tržišnog natjecanja) — competition authority. Croatia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.
Podravka, Kraš — major Croatian food companies. Agrokor/Fortenova Group — the largest food and retail conglomerate in Southeast Europe.
HZZO (Hrvatski zavod za zdravstveno osiguranje) — Croatia's health insurance fund. Ministry of Health oversees nutrition policy.
Hrvatski sabor (Croatian Parliament) — unicameral, 151 members. Contact through sabor.hr. Croatia is an EU and Eurozone member.

HT.s: Fragile state ($25.2B GDP) — Western Hemisphere's poorest country. 農業がGDPの 15.9% GDP (coffee, mangoes, cocoa). Extreme 森林破壊 (2% forest cover remaining). Gang violence and political instability. 製造業がGDPの 26.2% GDP (garment assembly).

sectors.w: Haiti's near-total 森林破壊 (98% forest loss) means any remaining agriculture operates on severely degraded land. The システム依存性 is already partially broken — Haiti has experienced the endpoint of 森林破壊-driven agricultural collapse. Reforestation is the intervention.
bp: 改革する agricultural support to incentivize tree planting and agroforestry. ...の場合 hillside farmers receive more support for tree crops (coffee, cocoa, fruit) than annual crops on degraded slopes, ...における重複利益 continued 森林破壊 breaks.
Satellite monitoring of remaining forest cover and soil erosion published at commune level. Making degradation visible makes W computable.
Extreme システム依存性 — 98% forest loss means agricultural activity on degraded slopes directly causes erosion, flooding, and further land degradation. Reforestation is the only path to reducing システム依存性.

Report illegal charcoal production to MDE (Ministry of Environment)

i: MDE (Ministère de l'Environnement) — the environment ministry, severely under-resourced. Note: Haiti's state institutions are largely non-functional due to the ongoing security and governance crisis. International organizations (UN, USAID, EU) provide most 環境 programming.
Haiti's private sector is small. The Chambre de Commerce d'Haïti coordinates business activities. International NGOs (Partners in Health, Trees for the Future) implement many development programs.

MARNDR (Ministère de l'Agriculture, des Ressources Naturelles et du Développement Rural) — the agriculture ministry. ONEV (Observatoire National de l'Environnement et de la Vulnérabilité) — 環境 monitoring.

Note: Haiti's democratic institutions are non-functional — no elected parliament since 2023, no elected president. Transitional governance is underway. International channels: UN Integrated Office in Haiti (BINUH), CARICOM, OAS, Haitian diaspora organizations.

HU.s: EU加盟国 ($222.7B GDP) with strong manufacturing (15.8% GDP, automotive-focused). サービス業がGDPの 59.5% GDP. Small oil and gas sector (MOL Group). 農業がGDPの 2.7% GDP. Democratic backsliding under Orbán government has strained EU relations.

sectors.w: Hungary has one of Europe's highest obesity rates and introduced a 'chip tax' (NETA — népegészségügyi termékadó) on UPF in 2011. ...の場合 health insurance data (NEAK) links diet to healthcare costs per product category, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: 強化する the NETA tax and extend to broader UPF categories. Hungary's pioneering public health product tax 弱まる ...における重複利益 high-margin UPF by internalizing health costs.
NEAK publication of diet-attributable healthcare expenditure. Hungary's health insurance system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. 改革するulation targets can reduce システム依存性.

採用する transparent nutritional labelling

Support EU-wide front-of-pack labelling through Farm to Fork Strategy
Advocate for WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
を推進する： EU cohesion funds for public health nutrition programs
i: NÉBIH (Nemzeti Élelmiszerlánc-biztonsági Hivatal) — Hungary's food chain safety authority. GVH (Gazdasági Versenyhivatal) — competition authority enforcing fair advertising. Hungary transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive.
Major companies: Bonafarm Group, Pick Szeged. International companies operating in Hungary: Nestlé, Coca-Cola, PepsiCo.

NETA (népegészségügyi termékadó) — Hungary's public health product tax, one of the world's first UPF taxes, introduced 2011. NEAK (Nemzeti Egészségbiztosítási Alapkezelő) — national health insurance fund.
Országgyűlés (National Assembly of Hungary) — unicameral parliament, 199 members. Contact through parlament.hu.

ID.s: G20 経済 ($1,396.3B GDP). World's largest palm oil producer (palm oil=~3.5% GDP). Significant coal (1.22% rents), oil/gas (1.61%), and 鉱業 (1.91%). Massive archipelago with extraordinary biodiversity. Palm oil expansion has driven catastrophic 森林破壊.

sectors.w: Indonesia produces ~60% of global palm oil. EUDR compliance will require zero-森林破壊 traceability to plantation level. ...の場合 発電所ごとのation forest loss data is linked to palm oil transactions, Wが計算可能になる from commodity prices.
bp: EUDR compliance forcing zero-森林破壊 supply chain traceability. ...の場合 international buyers require verified 森林破壊-free palm oil, ...における重複利益 clearing forest for new plantations breaks — productivity improvement on existing land becomes the viable model.

Mandatory per-concession 環境 data (fire occurrence, peat depth, biodiversity surveys) linked to ISPO certification. Indonesia's KLHK already monitors 森林破壊 by satellite — publishing per-company data makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, smallholder agroforestry and yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce pressure for new forest conversion.

Document land rights violations — report to Komnas HAM (National Human Rights Commission)
Report fire-setting to Satgas Karhutla (forest fire task force)

採用する RSPO certification across all operations
に投資する yield improvement rather than area expansion
KLHK: 施行する the permanent moratorium on new primary forest and peatland conversion
強化する ISPO mandatory certification with 環境 performance metrics

Support EUDR implementation with adequate transition support for smallholders
を通じて提唱する： ASEAN for regional zero-森林破壊 commitments
を推進する： international tropical forest conservation finance
i: KLHK (Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup dan Kehutanan) — the environment and forestry ministry, responsible for forest management, 環境 regulation, and fire prevention. Komnas HAM (Komisi Nasional Hak Asasi Manusia) — the national human rights commission. WALHI (Wahana Lingkungan Hidup Indonesia / Friends of the Earth Indonesia) — the largest 環境 NGO.

Wilmar International — the world's largest palm oil trader. Golden Agri-Resources (Sinar Mas Group) — one of the largest palm oil producers. GAPKI (Gabungan Pengusaha Kelapa Sawit Indonesia) — the Indonesian palm oil association. RSPO and ISPO (Indonesian Sustainable パーム油) — certification standards.

One Map Policy (Kebijakan Satu Peta) — Indonesia's initiative to create a single, authoritative map of land use and forest cover to resolve overlapping concessions. BPDPKS (Badan Pengelola Dana Perkebunan Kelapa Sawit) — the palm oil plantation fund managing the CPO export levy.

DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat / People's Representative Council) — lower house, 580 members. DPD (Dewan Perwakilan Daerah / Regional Representative Council) — upper house, 136 members. Contact through dpr.go.id. Indonesia is a presidential 民主主義 and the world's third-largest 民主主義.

IE.s: High-income EU 経済 ($609.2B GDP, inflated by multinational profit booking). 製造業がGDPの 29.6% GDP (pharma, tech). Major corporate tax hub. 農業がGDPの 1% GDP but intensive dairy farming with significant methane 排出. サービス業がGDPの 60.6% GDP.

sectors.w: Ireland's dairy herd expansion post-milk-quota-abolition (2015) increased methane 排出 by 20%+. ...の場合 per-farm greenhouse gas data is published alongside output, Wが計算可能になる from agricultural production data.
bp: 改革する CAP subsidies from production-linked to 環境 outcome-linked. ...の場合 dairy expansion no longer receives per-cow support, ...における重複利益 herd growth 弱まる.
Mandatory per-farm greenhouse gas balance disclosure. Ireland's Bord Bia Origin Green program collects data — making it publicly verifiable makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Ruminant digestion produces methane by biological process. Feed additives (e.g., 3-NOP) can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane.
a: Report 環境 violations to EPA Ireland
Document water pollution from dairy — report to local authority water services
Use Irish Protected Disclosures Act 2014 for protected reporting
Kerry Group, Glanbia, Ornua: Set binding methane reduction targets
に投資する methane-reducing feed technologies
採用する Science Based Targets for Irish dairy operations
DAFM: 改革する agricultural supports toward 排出 reduction
EPA: 強化する agricultural 排出 monitoring
Bord Bia: Make Origin Green data independently verifiable
あなたの代表者に連絡してください： TD (Teachta Dála) or Senator を要求する binding agricultural 排出 reduction targets
Support stronger EU CAP conditionality on methane
Advocate for inclusion of agricultural methane in EU ETS

i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency) — Ireland's 環境 regulator. Protected Disclosures Act 2014 (amended 2022) — Ireland's 内部告発者 protection law, one of the strongest in Europe.

Kerry Group — major food ingredients company. Glanbia — dairy and nutrition company. Ornua (formerly Irish Dairy Board) — manages Kerrygold brand. Teagasc — the agriculture and food development authority providing research and extension.
DAFM (Department of Agriculture, Food and the Marine) — Ireland's agriculture ministry. Bord Bia (Irish Food Board) — the food marketing agency running the Origin Green sustainability program.

Oireachtas (Parliament of Ireland) — bicameral: Dáil Éireann (160 TDs) and Seanad Éireann (60 Senators). Contact through oireachtas.ie. Ireland's Climate Action and Low Carbon 策定するment Act (2021) sets legally binding 排出 budgets.

IL.s: High-tech 経済 ($540.4B GDP) with dominant services (72.5% GDP). High military expenditure (8.78% GDP). Gas production from Leviathan and Tamar fields (0.43% gas rents). Major tech sector — 'Startup Nation.' Water management leader (desalination, drip irrigation).

sectors.w: Israel's Mediterranean gas fields (Leviathan, Tamar) were discovered in 2009-2010. Per-field 排出 disclosure through ISA (Israel Securities Authority) listed company requirements makes W computable from production data.
bp: Export gas to replace coal in Egypt and Jordan — net 排出 benefit if displacing higher-carbon sources. But this locks in gas infrastructure. ...の場合 renewable alternatives become cheaper for regional electricity, the 重複利益 弱まる.
Mandatory 油田ごとの 排出 disclosure for Leviathan and Tamar operators. ISA reporting requirements provide the mechanism to make W computable.
破壊不可能 by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.

Document offshore 排出 — report through Delek/Chevron compliance channels
に報告する： ISA if ESG disclosures are misleading

に投資する regional 再生可能エネルギー integration

Electricity Authority: Accelerate 再生可能エネルギー targets (Israel aims for 30% renewable by 2030)
Ministry of Environmental Protection: 強化する offshore 環境 standards
あなたの代表者に連絡してください： member of the Knesset を要求する binding 再生可能エネルギー targets and gas 排出 disclosure
Support regional energy cooperation through the Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum (EMGF)
Advocate for Abraham Accords normalization to include 再生可能エネルギー cooperation with Gulf states
を推進する： OECD 環境 performance review recommendations implementation
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — Israel's 環境当局. ISA (Israel Securities Authority) — regulates disclosure for listed companies including Delek Group. Israel has 内部告発者 protections under the Protection of Workers (Exposure of Offenses) Law, 1997.
NewMed Energy — operates Leviathan field. Chevron — acquired Noble Energy's interest in Tamar. Israel Natural Gas Lines (INGL) — the 国有 gas transmission company.

Petroleum Commissioner — within the Ministry of Energy, oversees oil and gas licensing. Electricity Authority — the independent electricity regulator. Israel's Electricity Market 改革する aims to increase competition and renewable penetration.

Knesset (כנסת) — Israel's unicameral parliament, 120 members. Contact through knesset.gov.il. Israel is an OECD member. EMGF (Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum) — regional organization for gas market coordination.

IQ.s: Oil-dependent 経済 ($279.6B GDP) with 43.45% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. OPEC member producing ~4.5M bpd. Massive gas flaring (Iraq flares more gas than almost any other country). Post-conflict reconstruction ongoing.

sectors.w: Iraq flares $2.5B+ worth of associated gas annually. Capturing and monetizing flared gas makes W computable — the flared gas represents pure waste visible from satellite (World Bank GGFR data).
bp: Gas capture and monetization. Iraq wastes $2.5B/year in flared gas. ...の場合 gas capture infrastructure is built, ...における重複利益 flaring (which is cheaper short-term than processing) breaks as captured gas generates revenue.
Satellite-based flare monitoring (VIIRS nightfire data) already makes gas flaring volumes visible globally. Linking 油田ごとの flaring data to production revenue makes W computable.
破壊不可能. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

Document gas flaring volumes — satellite data from World Bank GGFR provides independent verification
Report through Iraq EITI channels
BP (Rumaila), TotalEnergies (Halfaya), ExxonMobil (West Qurna): に投資する associated gas capture infrastructure
実施する flare reduction targets

Ministry of Environment: 強化する air quality enforcement near oil fields

Support UN Iraq partnership on 環境 governance capacity building
i: Note: Iraq's institutional capacity for 環境 regulation is limited. The Ministry of Oil oversees petroleum operations. EITI Iraq — Iraq has been EITI compliant since 2012. World Bank Global Gas Flaring Reduction Partnership (GGFR) — monitors and reports on global gas flaring using satellite data.

BP operates Rumaila (Iraq's largest field). TotalEnergies has the $27B Gas Growth Integrated Project (GGIP) to capture associated gas. ExxonMobil, Lukoil, PetroChina — other major operators. Basra Oil Company — manages southern oil fields.

Ministry of Oil — oversees all petroleum operations and manages Technical Service Contracts (TSCs) with international operators. Ministry of Environment — responsible for 環境 policy but severely under-resourced.

Note: Iraq is a 議院内閣制 民主主義 but governance is fragmented among sectarian and ethnic power blocs. Council of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 329 members). International channels: OPEC membership, World Bank, UNAMI (UN Assistance Mission for Iraq), GGFR.

IR.s: Major oil and gas producer ($475.3B GDP) with 27.08% combined rents. World's second-largest natural gas reserves (after Russia). Under comprehensive international 制裁. 製造業がGDPの 20.6% GDP. Theocratic governance limits civic channels.

sectors.w: International 制裁 have already weakened the 重複利益 by restricting Iran's ability to monetize oil exports at market price. ...の場合 制裁 enforcement eliminates the discount market, Iran's economic model requires diversification.
bp: Sanctions enforcement. ...の場合 Iran cannot sell oil at market prices, the economic case for 再生可能エネルギー investment (Iran has excellent solar potential) strengthens. The 重複利益 in oil dependence breaks when export revenues are structurally constrained.
Per-field 環境 data is largely unavailable due to 制裁-related opacity. International satellite monitoring (methane detection) provides external data to estimate W.
破壊不可能. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

Document air pollution and health impacts — Iran's cities rank among the world's most polluted
Report through international academic and research channels
NIOC: Reduce gas flaring and venting at production facilities
に投資する domestic solar and wind energy development
実施する 排出 monitoring for major fields
Ministry of Petroleum: 実施する flaring reduction programs
DoE: 強化する air quality enforcement in Tehran and major cities
Ministry of Energy: Accelerate 再生可能エネルギー development
Support international climate cooperation mechanisms that include Iran
を通じて提唱する： OPEC for managed transition planning

Support Iranian diaspora 環境 advocacy organizations
i: DoE (سازمان حفاظت محیط زیست / Department of Environment) — Iran's 環境当局, which has limited enforcement power. NIOC (National Iranian Oil Company) — the state oil company. Note: Iran has no effective 内部告発者 protection. Civil society is severely constrained.

NIOC — controls all upstream oil and gas operations. NIGC (National Iranian Gas Company) — manages gas production and distribution. Pars Oil and Gas Company — manages South Pars/North Dome gas field operations.

Ministry of Petroleum — oversees oil and gas policy. Iran's Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency Organization (SATBA) — responsible for 再生可能エネルギー development. Iran has installed some solar and wind capacity but it remains a tiny fraction of energy supply.

Note: Iran is a theocratic republic. The Islamic Consultative Assembly (Majles, 290 members) has limited power relative to the Supreme Leader and Guardian Council. International channels: OPEC, UNFCCC (Iran signed but did not ratify Paris Agreement), UN Environment Programme.

IS.s: Small advanced 経済 ($33.3B GDP) with 100% renewable electricity (geothermal and hydro). 水産業 are 5% of GDP and the largest PST exposure — Iceland's fisheries management is globally studied but faces sustainability challenges from ocean warming.

sectors.w: Iceland's ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system generates detailed per-vessel catch data. ...の場合 ecosystem health metrics (stock assessments, bycatch, seabed impact) are published alongside fishing revenue, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: 改革する ITQ allocations to include ecosystem impact costs. ...の場合 quota holders pay for bycatch and seabed damage, ...における重複利益 maximum extraction 弱まる.
Publish per-vessel ecosystem impact data alongside catch revenue. Iceland's Marine and Freshwater Research Institute already conducts stock assessments — linking to economic data makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Fishing inherently removes biomass from marine ecosystems. However, science-based quota management can keep extraction within sustainable yield limits.

実施する per-vessel bycatch reduction technology

Marine Research Institute: Publish ecosystem health indicators alongside quota recommendations
Fiskistofa: 強化する monitoring and enforcement
あなたの代表者に連絡してください： member of the Alþingi を要求する ecosystem-based fisheries management reform
Support NEAFC (North-East Atlantic 水産業 Commission) sustainable management measures
Advocate for Arctic Council fisheries governance coordination
を推進する： inclusion of ecosystem health metrics in national accounts
i: Fiskistofa (Directorate of 水産業) — responsible for fisheries management, quota enforcement, and monitoring. Hafrannsóknastofnun (Marine and Freshwater Research Institute) — conducts stock assessments and marine research.

Samherji — Iceland's largest fishing company. Brim, HB Grandi — other major fishing companies. SFS (Samtök fyrirtækja í sjávarútvegi / Federation of Icelandic Fishing Vessel Owners) — the industry association.

Ministry of Food, Agriculture and 水産業 — oversees fisheries policy. The ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system — Iceland's fisheries management system, one of the world's most studied, allocating catch shares that can be traded.

Alþingi (Althing) — Iceland's unicameral parliament, 63 members, one of the world's oldest legislatures (established 930 CE). Contact through althingi.is. NEAFC — the regional fisheries management organization for the Northeast Atlantic.

JG.s: British Crown Dependencies ($12.5B GDP) — Jersey and Guernsey. Major offshore financial centers (91.2% services). Financial services dominate with significant fund administration and trust structures. Not part of the UK or EU but closely aligned with UK regulatory standards.

sectors.w: Channel Islands' financial services facilitate global capital flows with lower 透明性 than UK mainland. ...の場合 beneficial ownership data and tax 透明性 information are published, Wが計算可能になる from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full beneficial ownership 透明性 aligned with UK Economic Crime Act requirements. ...の場合 financial secrecy is eliminated, the 重複利益 between service providers and opacity-seeking clients 弱まる.
Mandatory CRS (Common Reporting Standard) enhanced reporting. Publishing aggregate capital flow data makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Financial intermediation can relocate but the Channel Islands' proximity to London and established legal infrastructure create switching costs.
a: Report suspicious transactions to JFIU (Joint Financial Intelligence Unit) in Jersey or FIS (Financial Intelligence Service) in Guernsey
Document regulatory violations — report to JFSC or GFSC
Report through internal bank compliance channels

JFSC/GFSC: 強化する beneficial ownership verification
実施する UK Economic Crime Act-aligned 透明性
施行する enhanced AML due diligence requirements
Engage through UK Parliament channels — the Crown Dependencies' constitutional relationship means the UK Parliament has ultimate legislative authority
Support OECD Global Forum on Transparency standards
Advocate for Moneyval enhanced evaluation compliance
を推進する： alignment with EU AMLD standards
i: JFSC (Jersey 金融サービス Commission) — Jersey's financial regulator. GFSC (Guernsey 金融サービス Commission) — Guernsey's financial regulator. JFIU / FIS — financial intelligence units.
Channel Islands host operations of major international banks and fund administrators. Jersey Finance and Guernsey Finance promote the financial services sectors.
JFSC — Jersey's integrated financial regulator. GFSC — Guernsey's equivalent. Both crown dependencies have their own regulatory frameworks but coordinate closely with UK authorities.

States of Jersey (49 members) and States of Guernsey (38 members) — the insular legislatures. Constitutional relationship with UK means UK Parliament can legislate for the Crown Dependencies on international obligations.

JM.s: Caribbean island 経済 ($22B GDP) with tourism and services dominant (60% GDP). 農業がGDPの 8% GDP. Bauxite/alumina industry historically significant but declining. Climate-vulnerable. High debt burden (IMF structural adjustment).

sectors.w: Jamaica's agricultural sector is dominated by sugar and banana monoculture on degraded soils. ...の場合 soil health and watershed degradation data is published alongside agricultural output, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: 改革する agricultural subsidies toward crop diversification and agroforestry. ...の場合 farmers receive support for diverse crops rather than monoculture sugar, the 重複利益 breaks.
Publish watershed health and soil erosion data linked to agricultural practices. NEPA collects 環境 data — linking to farming output makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Tropical monoculture inherently degrades soil. Jamaica's Blue Mountain coffee model shows premium diversification is viable.
a: Report 環境 violations to NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency)
Document agricultural chemical misuse — report to RADA (Rural Agricultural 策定するment Authority)
Report through industry self-regulation channels
Sugar Company of Jamaica Holdings: Diversify beyond sugar monoculture
に投資する specialty crop development (Blue Mountain coffee, cocoa)
採用する soil health monitoring

SIA (Sugar Industry Authority): Support sugar industry transition

i: NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency) — Jamaica's 環境当局. RADA — provides agricultural extension services.
Sugar Industry Authority — regulates Jamaica's sugar sector. Jamaica Producers Group — diversified agricultural company.
Ministry of Agriculture and 水産業 — oversees agricultural policy. SIA — regulates the sugar industry.
Parliament of Jamaica — bicameral: House of Representatives (63 members) and Senate (21 appointed). Jamaica is a Westminster-style 議院内閣制 民主主義.

JO.s: Water-scarce Middle Eastern 経済 ($53.4B GDP) with limited natural resources. サービス業がGDPの 60.4% GDP. High military expenditure (4.8% GDP). 製造業がGDPの 17.7% (phosphate, potash, pharmaceuticals). Among the world's most water-stressed countries.

sectors.w: Jordan's phosphate and potash 鉱業 (Arab Potash Company, Jordan Phosphate Mines Company) depletes Dead Sea water levels and contaminates groundwater. ...の場合 環境 cost data is published alongside 鉱業 revenue, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: Internalize 環境 costs (Dead Sea decline, water depletion) into 鉱業 operations through 環境 levies. ...の場合 miners pay for water extraction in one of Earth's most water-stressed countries, ...における重複利益 water-intensive extraction 弱まる.
Publish 鉱山ごとの water consumption and Dead Sea level impact data. Jordan's water authority collects data — linking to 鉱業 output makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Mining inherently uses water. However, water recycling and dry processing can reduce per-ton water consumption.
a: Report 環境 violations to the Ministry of Environment
Document water extraction impacts — report to WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan)
Report through JPMC or APC compliance channels
JPMC (Jordan Phosphate Mines Company): 実施する water recycling targets
APC (Arab Potash Company): 採用する Dead Sea impact mitigation measures
Both: 採用する per-unit 環境 impact reporting

i: Ministry of Environment — Jordan's 環境当局. WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan) — manages the country's severely limited water resources. Jordan has approximately 60 cubic meters of renewable water per capita — far below the 500 m³ threshold for absolute water scarcity.
JPMC — one of the world's largest phosphate producers. APC (Arab Potash Company) — extracts potash from the Dead Sea.
Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources — oversees 鉱業 policy. NRA (Natural Resources Authority) — the 鉱業 regulatory body.

Majlis al-Umma (Parliament of Jordan) — bicameral: Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives, 130 members, elected) and Majlis al-Ayan (Senate, 65 appointed). Jordan is a 立憲君主制 with limited democratic space.

KE.s: East Africa's largest 経済 ($120.3B GDP) with agriculture at 22.5% GDP (tea, coffee, horticulture). サービス業がGDPの 55.3%. 90%+ renewable electricity (geothermal, hydro). Vibrant tech sector (M-Pesa). Wildlife tourism. Climate-vulnerable (drought cycles).

sectors.w: Kenya's tea and horticulture sectors use intensive farming on shrinking arable land. ...の場合 per-farm water and pesticide data is published alongside export revenue, Wが計算可能になる. Kenya's M-Pesa infrastructure enables farm-level data collection.
bp: 改革する agricultural export incentives to require 環境 certification. ...の場合 tea and flower exports must demonstrate sustainable water and pesticide use, ...における重複利益 intensive monoculture 弱まる.
Farm-level 環境 data collection using mobile technology (Kenya's digital infrastructure is advanced). Making water and chemical use visible per farm makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Intensive horticulture inherently affects water and soil systems. However, Kenya's organic agriculture sector is growing and agroforestry can reduce システム依存性.

i: NEMA (National Environment Management Authority) — Kenya's 環境 regulator, responsible for 環境 impact assessments, pollution control, and enforcement. KTDA — manages tea production for ~600,000 smallholder farmers. KFC (Kenya Flower Council) — the self-regulatory body for the cut flower industry. Unilever (Lipton/Ekaterra) — major buyer of Kenyan tea.

Parliament of Kenya — bicameral: National Assembly (349 members) and Senate (67 members). Contact through parliament.go.ke. Kenya's 2010 Constitution includes strong 環境 protection provisions (Article 42 — right to a clean and healthy environment).

KG.s: Small mountainous 経済 ($17.5B GDP) dominated by gold 鉱業 (Kumtor mine = 10%+ of GDP, min=11.15%). 農業がGDPの 8.6% GDP. Remittances from Russia significant. Parliamentary 民主主義 (rare in Central Asia).

Per-mine water quality and glacier impact monitoring published openly. Making 環境 costs visible makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Mining at high altitude inherently affects glacial systems. Improved tailings management can reduce impact.

KH.s: Lower-middle-income 経済 ($46.4B GDP) with garment manufacturing (27.8% GDP) and agriculture (16.6%). Mekong Delta 森林破壊 ongoing. Authoritarian governance under Hun Manet (succeeded Hun Sen in 2023).

Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and 水産業 — oversees agricultural and forestry policy. Ministry of Environment — manages protected areas. Sub-Decree 146 on Economic Land Concessions governs the ELC system.

Note: Cambodia's National Assembly (125 members) is dominated by the CPP. The Senate (62 members) is similarly controlled. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, EU EBA trade preferences (EU has partially withdrawn preferences citing human rights concerns).

KZ.s: Central Asia's largest 経済 ($291.5B GDP) with massive oil (14.84%) and gas (2.04%) rents. Tengiz, Kashagan, and Karachaganak are mega-fields. Mining at 9.1% (uranium — world's largest producer, copper, gold). Coal at 0.85%. Authoritarian governance.

Ministry of Energy — oversees oil, gas, and energy policy. Samruk-Kazyna — the national wealth fund holding state shares in KazMunayGas and other state enterprises. National Fund of the Republic of Kazakhstan — the sovereign wealth fund (managed by the National Bank) with $55B+ in assets.

Note: Kazakhstan under President Tokayev is rated 'Not Free.' The Mazhilis (lower house, 107 members) and Senate (50 members) do not function independently. International channels: EITI, Tehran Convention (Caspian 環境 cooperation), SCO (Shanghai Cooperation Organisation), OSCE.

LK.s: Island 経済 ($99B GDP) recovering from 2022 economic crisis. 農業がGDPの 8.3% GDP (tea, rubber, coconut). 製造業がGDPの 17.6% (garments). Tourism significant. Post-crisis IMF program. Historically one of Asia's highest human development indicators.

Per-estate 環境 data for tea, rubber, and coconut published alongside export revenue. Sri Lanka's Tea Research Institute collects data — making it public makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Sri Lanka's 2021 experiment showed both the reality of システム依存性 (sudden decoupling fails) and its reducibility (gradual transition with soil biology rebuilding works).

MA.s: North African 経済 ($160.6B GDP) with agriculture at 10.6% GDP and growing 再生可能エネルギー sector (Noor-Ouarzazate solar complex). Major phosphate producer (OCP Group — world's largest). 製造業がGDPの 15.3% GDP.

MC.s: City-state ($11.1B GDP) with 87.2% services. Major financial center and tourism hub. No income tax for individuals. World's highest GDP per capita and population density. Limited PST exposure except through financial intermediation.

MD.s: Small Eastern European 経済 ($18.2B GDP). 農業がGDPの 7.1% GDP (wine, agriculture). サービス業がGDPの 62.3%. EU加盟候補国 country (2022). Significant remittance dependence. Energy dependent on Russian gas (via Transnistria).

MG.s: Biodiversity hotspot 経済 ($17.4B GDP). 農業がGDPの 22.5% GDP. One of Earth's most biodiverse countries (90%+ species endemic). Devastating 森林破壊 (fr=5.45% forest rents). Mining growing (ilmenite, nickel). Extreme poverty.

Extreme システム依存性. Tavy on degraded laterite soils causes erosion and desertification. Madagascar's red soil runoff is visible from space.

MK.s: Small Western Balkan 経済 ($17B GDP). 製造業がGDPの 14.3% GDP. サービス業がGDPの 56.2%. EU加盟候補国 country. Coal-dependent energy. 農業がGDPの 6.1% GDP.

ML.s: Sahelian 経済 ($26.8B GDP) with gold 鉱業 (16.18% GDP) and agriculture (33.3% GDP). Military junta since 2020-2021 coups. Security crisis (jihadist insurgency). Third-largest gold producer in Africa.

MM.s: Resource-rich 経済 ($74.1B GDP) under military junta since 2021 coup. ガスレント 4.4%. Jade and gem 鉱業 (est. $31B/year — more than formal GDP). 農業がGDPの 20.8% GDP. Civil war affecting multiple regions.

MN.s: Resource-dependent landlocked 経済 ($23.8B GDP). Mining at 26.57% GDP (copper, coal, gold). Coal at 4.89% GDP. Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto/Turquoise Hill). Parliamentary 民主主義 — rare in the region.

MW.s: Low-income 経済 ($11.3B GDP). 農業がGDPの 31.8% GDP — tobacco is the largest export (50%+ of export revenue). One of the world's poorest countries. High climate vulnerability.

NA.s: Upper-middle-income 経済 ($13.4B GDP) with 鉱業 at 3.17% (uranium, diamonds). 農業がGDPの 7.3% GDP. One of Africa's most stable democracies. Major new oil discoveries offshore (TotalEnergies, Shell). Green hydrogen ambitions.

NI.s: Small Central American 経済 ($19.7B GDP). 農業がGDPの 14.4% GDP. Mining at 2.68% (gold). Authoritarian governance under Ortega. サービス業がGDPの 46.8%.

NP.s: Mountainous South Asian 経済 ($42.9B GDP). 農業がGDPの 21.9% GDP. Massive hydropower potential (~83 GW technically feasible, only ~2.3 GW developed). Remittances ~25% of GDP. Climate-vulnerable (glacial lake outburst floods).

NZ.s: Advanced 経済 ($260.2B GDP) with intensive dairy farming driving agricultural exports. 農業がGDPの 4.4% GDP but outsized 環境 footprint (dairy is largest export sector). サービス業がGDPの 64.6%. Strong democratic institutions. Ambitious climate targets.

sectors.w: New Zealand's dairy intensification (6.3M dairy cows) has degraded waterways (nitrogen and E. coli contamination). ...の場合 per-farm nutrient discharge data is published alongside farm revenue, Wが計算可能になる.

Farm Environment Plans with mandatory public nutrient discharge data. NZ's 'He Waka Eke Noa' partnership generates farm-level data — public disclosure makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Ruminant digestion produces methane biologically. Feed additives can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane. Riparian planting reduces but doesn't eliminate nutrient runoff.

Fonterra Co-operative Group — the world's largest dairy exporter, processing ~80% of NZ milk. Fonterra's procurement standards directly influence ~10,000 dairy farms.
NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) — requires regional councils to set limits on resource use to achieve 環境 bottom lines. MPI — oversees primary sector policy.

New Zealand Parliament (House of Representatives, 120 members, MMP electoral system). Contact through parliament.nz. NZ Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act 2019 sets separate targets for biogenic methane.

OM.s: Oil-dependent Gulf 経済 ($107.1B GDP) with 29.21% combined oil and gas rents. PDO (Petroleum 策定するment Oman, 60% government, 34% Shell) is the main operator. Diversifying through Oman Vision 2040. Hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Oman's oil production uses enhanced oil recovery (EOR) including solar-powered steam injection. As EOR costs rise on mature fields, diversification to green hydrogen becomes economically rational.
bp: Green hydrogen investment as alternative export commodity. Oman has committed $30B+ to green hydrogen projects. ...の場合 hydrogen revenue streams are established, ...における重複利益 oil dependence 弱まる.
Per-field 排出 disclosure for all PDO and other operator operations. Wを計算可能にする.
破壊不可能. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

Majlis Oman — bicameral: Majlis al-Shura (86 elected) and Majlis al-Dawla (86 appointed). Oman is a sultanate with limited but growing 議院内閣制 activity.

PA.s: Services-dominant 経済 ($86.5B GDP) with the Panama Canal generating significant revenue. Financial services hub. Mining at 3.58% (Cobre Panamá copper mine — First Quantum, closed by Supreme Court ruling 2023). サービス業がGDPの 69.3%.

sectors.w: Panama's Supreme Court ruled the Cobre Panamá 鉱業 contract unconstitutional in November 2023, following massive public protests. The 重複利益 between the 鉱業 company and government has been broken by democratic action.
bp: The Cobre Panamá precedent — democratic rejection of 鉱業 contracts that do not serve the public interest. This is a direct break of the 重複利益 through civic action and judicial review.
Environmental monitoring of mine closure and remediation. Making closure costs visible makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. The mine exists — remediation is needed regardless. Closure reduces ongoing システム依存性.

Asamblea Nacional de Panamá — unicameral, 71 members. Panama's Cobre Panamá case is a globally significant precedent for democratic control over extractive industries. First Quantum has filed an ICSID arbitration claim.

PE.s: Resource-rich 経済 ($289.2B GDP) with 鉱業 at 12.1% GDP (world's second-largest copper producer, major silver and gold). 農業がGDPの 7.3%. サービス業がGDPの 51.3%. Social conflicts around 鉱業 are frequent.

Mandatory 鉱山ごとの 環境 monitoring data published in real-time (OEFA already collects this). Public disclosure makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Mining disturbs landscapes. But Peru's 鉱業 環境 standards have improved significantly — enforcement is the gap.
