Major mines: Antamina (BHP/Glencore), Cerro Verde (Freeport-McMoRan), Las Bambas (MMG/China Minmetals). SNMPE (Sociedad Nacional de Minería, Petróleo y Energía) — the industry association.
MINEM (Ministerio de Energía y Minas) — the energy and 鉱業 ministry. ANA — the national water authority. EITI Peru — member since 2012.
Congreso de la República del Perú — unicameral, 130 members. Contact through congreso.gob.pe. Peru has ratified ILO Convention 169. Peru has not ratified the Escazú Agreement.

PG.s: Resource-rich Pacific island 経済 ($31.8B GDP). Mining at 14.41% GDP, gas at 9.14% (PNG LNG). 農業がGDPの 16.4%. Extraordinary biodiversity (7% of world's species on 1% of land). Customary land ownership covers 97% of territory.

sectors.w: PNG's 鉱業 sector (Ok Tedi, Porgera, Lihir) has a history of catastrophic 環境 damage. Ok Tedi mine discharged tailings directly into the Fly River system for decades. Environmental monitoring makes W computable.

部分的に破壊可能. Mining in tropical environments disturbs highly biodiverse ecosystems. But modern tailings management (not riverine disposal) can reduce システム依存性.

National Parliament of Papua New Guinea — unicameral, 111 members. PNG is a 立憲君主制 (King Charles III as head of state) with Westminster-style 議院内閣制 民主主義.

PH.s: Major Southeast Asian 経済 ($461.6B GDP). サービス業がGDPの 63.2% GDP. 農業がGDPの 9.1%. Mining at 1.52% (nickel — world's second-largest producer). 製造業がGDPの 15.7% (electronics). Extreme climate vulnerability — typhoons.

sectors.w: Philippines' nickel 鉱業 (for EV batteries) generates significant 環境 damage on small islands. ...の場合 鉱山ごとの 環境 data is linked to nickel exports, Wが計算可能になる.

Congress of the Philippines — bicameral: House of Representatives (316 members) and Senate (24 members). Contact through congress.gov.ph. Philippines is a presidential 民主主義.

PK.s: Large 経済 ($371.6B GDP) with agriculture at 23.7% GDP (cotton, wheat, rice, sugarcane). 製造業がGDPの 13.2%. サービス業がGDPの 50.7%. Severe climate vulnerability (2022 floods caused $30B+ damage). Water stress. Coal at 0.12%, gas at 0.74%.

sectors.w: Pakistan's cotton-wheat-rice monoculture cycle depletes groundwater and degrades soil. ...の場合 per-district water table and soil health data is published alongside agricultural output, Wが計算可能になる.

Per-district groundwater monitoring and soil health data. WAPDA already monitors water — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Irrigated agriculture in semi-arid conditions inherently depletes water. But drip irrigation and crop diversification can reduce システム依存性.

Parliament of Pakistan — bicameral: National Assembly (342 members) and Senate (100 members). Contact through na.gov.pk. Pakistan is a federal 議院内閣制 民主主義.

PL.s: Major EU 経済 ($917.8B GDP) with significant coal sector (0.25% rents but coal provides ~70% of electricity). 製造業がGDPの 16.1% GDP. サービス業がGDPの 59.1%. Coal transition is Poland's central climate challenge — 80,000+ miners.

sectors.w: Poland's coal sector is sustained by state subsidies and employment guarantees. EU ETS carbon pricing makes Polish coal uncompetitive. ...の場合 full carbon costs are internalized, the 重複利益 between miners and state employment programs breaks.
bp: EU ETS alignment without free allowances. At €90/ton carbon, Polish coal electricity costs 2-3x renewable alternatives. The 重複利益 breaks when coal plants cannot compete.
Per-plant 排出 and health-impact disclosure. Poland's coal plants cause 4,000+ premature deaths/year. Making health costs visible per MWh makes W computable.

i: GIOŚ (Główny Inspektorat Ochrony Środowiska) — the chief 環境 inspectorate. GIS (Główny Inspektorat Sanitarny) — the chief sanitary inspectorate monitoring public health. Poland transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2024.
PGE (Polska Grupa Energetyczna) — Poland's largest energy company. Tauron, Enea — other major energy companies. PGG (Polska Grupa Górnicza) — Poland's largest coal 鉱業 company (国有, ~40,000 employees).
URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — the エネルギー規制当局. NFEP (Narodowy Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska) — the 環境 fund financing green transition. Poland's coal phase-out agreement with 鉱業 unions targets 2049.

Sejm (460 members) and Senat (100 members). Contact through sejm.gov.pl and senat.gov.pl. EU Just Transition Fund — Poland is the largest recipient of JTF funding. Poland's 2020 coal phase-out agreement targets closure of all coal mines by 2049.

PR.s: US unincorporated territory ($126B GDP) with pharmaceutical manufacturing (44.1% of GDP — among world's highest pharma concentration). サービス業がGDPの 51.8%. Post-Hurricane Maria (2017) infrastructure challenges. LUMA Energy electricity crisis.

bp: 改革する food import tax structure to incentivize fresh food over UPF. ...の場合 imported UPF faces higher tariffs than fresh food, ...における重複利益 high-margin processed imports 弱まる.

Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. But Puerto Rico's tropical climate allows significant local food production to reduce import dependence.

PR Department of Agriculture — supports local agricultural development. Puerto Rico imports ~85% of food consumed.

Puerto Rico has a Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives (non-voting). Legislatura de Puerto Rico — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (51 members) and Senado (27 members). As a US territory, many policy decisions are made at the federal level.

PS.s: Occupied territory ($13.7B GDP, severely constrained by occupation). 農業がGDPの 7.4% GDP. サービス業がGDPの 76.2%. Economy dependent on Israeli work permits and international aid. Water access severely restricted. Active conflict zone.

sectors.w: Palestinian agriculture operates under severe water restrictions (Oslo II Accords limit Palestinian water extraction). ...の場合 water allocation data is published alongside agricultural output, the systemic welfare impact of occupation on agriculture becomes computable.
bp: International pressure for equitable water allocation per Oslo II renegotiation. ...の場合 Palestinian farmers access fair water shares, ...における重複利益 restricting agricultural development 弱まる.
Publication of per-community water allocation and agricultural productivity data. International monitoring (OCHA, World Bank) already collects data — systematic disclosure makes W computable.
Extreme システム依存性. The occupation structurally constrains agricultural development through water restrictions, land access, and movement controls.

i: PWA (Palestinian Water Authority) — manages water resources under severe constraints. EQA (Environment Quality Authority) — the Palestinian 環境当局. B'Tselem — Israeli human rights organization documenting occupation impacts.
Palestinian agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Olive oil is the most significant agricultural export. International NGOs and development agencies support agricultural development.

PWA — the key institution managing water allocation under occupation constraints. Joint Water Committee (JWC) — the Oslo-established mechanism for water cooperation between Israel and Palestine, widely criticized as inequitable.

Palestinian Legislative Council (PLC, 132 members) — non-functional since 2007. The Palestinian Authority operates through the executive. International channels: UNGA, UNHRC, ICJ Advisory Opinion on the Wall (2004), UN OCHA, UNRWA.

PT.s: EU 経済 ($313.3B GDP). サービス業がGDPの 66.3% GDP. 農業がGDPの 2% (cork, wine, olive oil). 製造業がGDPの 11.8%. Renewable energy leader (70%+ of electricity from renewables). Successfully phased out coal (2021).

sectors.w: Portugal's SNS (Serviço Nacional de Saúde) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-related costs per product category makes W computable.
bp: 実施する EU front-of-pack health labelling.

i: ASAE (Autoridade de Segurança Alimentar e Económica) — food safety and economic inspection. Lei 93/2021 — Portugal's 内部告発者 protection law.
Jerónimo Martins (Pingo Doce) — major Portuguese retailer. FIPA (Federação das Indústrias Portuguesas Agro-Alimentares) — food industry federation.
DGS (Direção-Geral da Saúde) — public health authority. SNS — the national health service.
Assembleia da República — unicameral, 230 members. Contact through parlamento.pt. Portugal is a 議院内閣制 民主主義.

PY.s: Landlocked South American 経済 ($44.5B GDP). 農業がGDPの 10.7% GDP (massive soy production — 4th largest exporter globally). 製造業がGDPの 19% GDP. サービス業がGDPの 48.7%. Itaipú Dam provides 90%+ renewable electricity. Severe 森林破壊 from soy expansion.

sectors.w: Paraguay's soy monoculture has destroyed 90%+ of Atlantic Forest and drives ongoing Chaco 森林破壊. ...の場合 per-farm 森林破壊 and 土壌劣化 data is linked to soy exports, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-森林破壊 soy. ...の場合 EU buyers require verified 森林破壊-free origin, ...における重複利益 Chaco clearing for soy breaks.
Satellite-based 森林破壊 monitoring linked to soy export data. Global Forest Watch already tracks Paraguay extensively — linking to farm-level data makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Soy monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. But no-till farming and cover cropping can reduce 土壌劣化.

i: SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente) — now MADES (Ministerio del Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible). INFONA (Instituto Forestal Nacional) — the forest management authority. INDI — the indigenous affairs institute.
Major soy traders operating in Paraguay: Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus. CAPPRO (Cámara Paraguaya de Procesadores de Oleaginosas y Cereales) — the oilseed processors' association.
MADES — environment ministry. Zero Deforestation Law (Ley 2524/2004) — prohibits conversion of forest to agriculture in the Eastern Region (but not the Chaco, where 森林破壊 continues).
Congreso Nacional del Paraguay — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (80 members) and Cámara de Senadores (45 members). Paraguay is a presidential republic.

QA.s: Hydrocarbon-dominated 経済 ($219.2B GDP). 工業がGDPの 58.2% GDP. 石油レント 15.28% GDP, gas rents 12.01% GDP — world's largest LNG exporter. サービス業がGDPの 46.1%. Highest per-capita CO₂ 排出 globally. Absolute monarchy.

sectors.w: Qatar's LNG dominance faces demand erosion as importing nations (Japan, South Korea, EU) diversify toward renewables and hydrogen. ...の場合 importers reduce LNG dependence, the 重複利益 弱まる.
bp: Importer diversification away from Qatari LNG. As Japan, Korea, and Europe invest in renewables and green hydrogen, ...における重複利益 fossil gas dependence 弱まる.
Per-field 排出 and flaring data disclosure. Qatar Energy already publishes aggregate sustainability data — extending to field-level reporting makes W computable.
破壊不可能. LNG combustion releases CO₂. Carbon capture on LNG (pre-combustion at liquefaction) captures only a fraction of lifecycle 排出.

i: QatarEnergy (formerly Qatar Petroleum) — the state hydrocarbon company controlling all oil and gas operations. International partners operate under production-sharing agreements.
QatarEnergy — 国有, operates the world's largest LNG facility at Ras Laffan Industrial City. North Field — the world's largest non-associated gas field.
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change — 環境 regulator. KAHRAMAA — electricity and water utility. Qatar National Vision 2030 — the national strategic framework.

Qatar is an absolute monarchy — the Emir governs by decree. Advisory Shura Council (45 members, 30 elected since 2021) has limited legislative power. International channels: GCC, OPEC (Qatar withdrew 2019 but re-engaged), COP process.

RO.s: EU加盟国 経済 ($382.6B GDP). 製造業がGDPの 13.2% GDP. ガスレント 0.53%, oil 0.38%. サービス業がGDPの 62.6%. Significant forestry issues — illegal logging in old-growth Carpathian forests despite EU加盟国ship.

sectors.w: Romania's large-scale agricultural land consolidation has created monoculture on former smallholdings. ...の場合 soil health data is linked to EU CAP payments, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme conditionality. ...の場合 subsidy payments depend on crop rotation and soil health metrics, ...における重複利益 exhaustive monoculture 弱まる.
Per-farm soil health monitoring through APIA (Agency for Payments and Intervention in Agriculture). Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. Grain monoculture degrades Romania's fertile black-earth soils. Cover cropping and crop rotation reduce システム依存性.

i: Garda Forestieră — Romania's forest guard, responsible for enforcing the Forest Code. Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură — state forestry inspectorate. Agent Green — Romanian 環境 NGO documenting illegal logging.
Romania has significant foreign-owned agricultural land. HS Timber (formerly Holzindustrie Schweighofer) — major timber processor, previously linked to illegal logging controversies.
APIA (Agenția de Plăți și Intervenție pentru Agricultură) — manages EU CAP payments. ANPM — 環境 protection agency. Ministry of Environment, Waters and Forests.
Parlamentul României — bicameral: Camera Deputaților (330 members) and Senat (136 members). EU加盟国 since 2007. Contact through cdep.ro and senat.ro.

RS.s: Western Balkan 経済 ($90.1B GDP). 製造業がGDPの 12.7%. 石炭レント 0.24% GDP — but coal supplies ~70% of electricity. EU加盟候補国 country. Mining sector growing (Rio Tinto lithium project controversy).

sectors.w: Serbia's lignite dependence (Nikola Tesla power plants — among Europe's worst SO₂ emitters) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make lignite uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring LCPD/IED compliance. Retrofitting Nikola Tesla A and B to meet EU emission limits costs more than replacement with renewables.
Per-plant 排出 and health cost data. HEAL (Health and Environment Alliance) has documented thousands of premature deaths. Wを計算可能にする.
破壊不可能. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury.

i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — 環境当局. CEKOR — Serbian 環境 NGO. RES Foundation — 再生可能エネルギー advocacy.
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) — state electricity utility operating Nikola Tesla A (1650 MW) and B (1240 MW) lignite plants. Kolubara 鉱業 basin — supplies lignite to these plants.
AERS (Agencija za energetiku Republike Srbije) — エネルギー規制当局. Serbia is an Energy Community Treaty member, requiring alignment with EU energy acquis.
Narodna skupština (National Assembly) — unicameral, 250 members. EU加盟候補国 country since 2012. Energy Community Treaty member.

RU.s: Major hydrocarbon 経済 ($2,173.8B GDP). 石油レント 9.67%, gas rents 5.86%, coal 0.61%, 鉱業 2.05% GDP. World's largest gas exporter, second-largest oil exporter. 軍事費 7.05% GDP. Authoritarian governance under international 制裁 since 2022.

sectors.w: Russia's oil and gas revenues have been severely constrained by Western 制裁 and price caps since 2022. Buyer diversification (EU pivot away from Russian gas) is actively breaking the 重複利益.
bp: Buyer diversification already underway. EU reduced Russian gas imports from ~40% to ~15% of supply. ...の場合 importers eliminate dependence, ...における重複利益 Russian fossil fuels breaks.
Sanctions-enforced 透明性 — G7 price cap mechanism requires attestation of pricing. This partially makes W computable, though enforcement gaps remain.
破壊不可能. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ regardless of source.

i: Note: Russia's domestic 市民社会 is severely repressed. Bellona Foundation (Norway-based) — documents Russian 環境 issues. iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe — independent Russian media operating from exile.
Gazprom — state gas monopoly. Rosneft — state oil company. Most Western majors (Shell, BP, ExxonMobil) have exited Russian operations since 2022.
G7 Russian Oil Price Cap Coalition — enforces $60/barrel cap through insurance and shipping services. EU 制裁 packages (14+ rounds). OFAC (US), OFSI (UK) — 制裁 enforcement.

Note: Russia's Federal Assembly (Federalnoye Sobraniye — State Duma 450 members, Federation Council 170 members) does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: G7/G20 (Russia suspended from G8), UN General Assembly, international 制裁 coalitions.

RW.s: Small East African 経済 ($14.3B GDP). 農業がGDPの 24.6% GDP. 森林レント 3.97%. サービス業がGDPの 47.6%. Remarkable post-genocide development but 権威主義 governance. Strong 環境 policy (plastic bag ban pioneer).

sectors.w: Rwanda's hillside agriculture on steep terrain causes erosion and 土壌劣化. ...の場合 soil erosion data is linked to agricultural output per district, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: Terracing and agroforestry expansion. Rwanda already has extensive terracing programs — extending to all cultivated hillsides with measurable soil retention targets breaks the 重複利益.
Per-district soil erosion monitoring linked to agricultural productivity data. Rwanda's strong data infrastructure supports this. Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. Hillside cultivation on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Terracing and contour farming reduce but cannot eliminate システム依存性.

i: REMA — the 環境 management authority. RAB — agricultural research and extension. Rwanda has strong institutional capacity relative to income level.
NAEB — manages agricultural export promotion (coffee, tea, pyrethrum). Rwanda's agricultural sector is organized through cooperatives and imihigo (performance contracts).
MINAGRI — agriculture ministry. RLMUA — land use authority. Rwanda's Vision 2050 includes 環境 sustainability targets.

Inteko Ishinga Amategeko (Parliament) — bicameral: Chamber of Deputies (80 members) and Senate (26 members). Note: Rwanda is effectively a one-party dominant state under RPF (Rwandan Patriotic Front). International channels: EAC (East African Community), AU, ICGLR.

SD.s: Conflict-affected 経済 ($49.7B GDP). 農業がGDPの 22.2% GDP. Mining 6.63% (gold). 石油レント 3.3% (reduced after South Sudan's independence). Civil war since April 2023 between SAF and RSF. Humanitarian catastrophe.

sectors.w: Sudan's artisanal gold 鉱業 uses mercury extensively and generates revenue streams funding armed groups. ...の場合 gold revenue flows are traced, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: International supply chain due diligence blocking conflict gold. ...の場合 refiners verify provenance, the 重複利益 between armed groups and gold revenues 弱まる.
Tracing gold flows from artisanal mines to international markets. LBMA (London Bullion Market Association) responsible sourcing standards provide the framework. Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. Artisanal 鉱業 uses mercury (Minamata Convention violation). Mercury-free processing methods exist but require investment.

i: Note: Sudan is in active civil war. No functioning domestic oversight exists. UN Panel of Experts — monitors 制裁 and conflict dynamics. IPIS (International Peace Information Service) — tracks artisanal 鉱業 and conflict resources.
Sudan's gold primarily flows through UAE (Dubai) trading hubs. LBMA — sets responsible sourcing standards for gold refiners worldwide.
LBMA — London Bullion Market Association, responsible sourcing standard-setter. FATF (Financial Action Task Force) — can designate jurisdictions for gold laundering risks.

Note: Sudan's transitional government collapsed with the April 2023 war. No functioning legislature. International channels: UN Security Council, AU (African Union Peace and Security Council), IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on 策定するment).

SE.s: Advanced Nordic 経済 ($603.7B GDP). 製造業がGDPの 13% GDP. Mining 1% GDP (iron ore — LKAB is Europe's largest). サービス業がGDPの 66.4%. Strong 環境 regulations. EU加盟国. Leading in green steel transition (HYBRIT).

sectors.w: Sweden's iron ore 鉱業 (LKAB) in northern Sweden affects Sami reindeer herding land and generates tailings. ...の場合 鉱山ごとの 環境 and indigenous impact data is published alongside production, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: Full internalization of indigenous land-use costs and 環境 remediation. ...の場合 LKAB pays for herding disruption and tailings management, ...における重複利益 low-cost extraction 弱まる.
Per-mine 環境 disclosure including impacts on Sami land use. LKAB publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verified indigenous impact assessments makes W computable.

部分的に破壊可能. HYBRIT (Hydrogen Breakthrough Ironmaking Technology) — SSAB/LKAB/Vattenfall joint venture — is producing fossil-free steel, demonstrating that 鉱業's downstream システム依存性 on carbon-intensive processing can be broken.

i: Naturvårdsverket — 環境 protection agency. Bergsstaten — the 鉱業 inspectorate, part of SGU (Sveriges geologiska undersökning — Geological Survey of Sweden). Sametinget — the Sami Parliament, representing indigenous Sami rights.
LKAB — 国有 iron ore company, Europe's largest. SSAB — steel producer, partner in HYBRIT. Boliden — base metals 鉱業 and smelting company. HYBRIT — world's first fossil-free steel initiative.
Mark- och miljödomstolarna — specialized 環境 courts. Sweden's Minerals Act (Minerallagen) governs 鉱業 permits.
Riksdag — unicameral parliament, 349 members. Contact through riksdagen.se. Sweden is a 立憲君主制 and EU加盟国.

SG.s: Advanced city-state 経済 ($547.4B GDP). サービス業がGDPの 73% GDP. 製造業がGDPの 16.3% (electronics, petrochemicals). No natural resources. Major petrochemical refining hub and global financial center. World's busiest transshipment port.

sectors.w: Singapore is a major petrochemical refining and trading hub — the 'Houston of Asia.' ...の場合 refinery 排出 and fossil fuel trading flows are disclosed per facility, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: Carbon tax escalation (Singapore's 炭素税 rises to S$25/tCO₂ in 2024, S$45 in 2026, S$50-80 by 2030). ...の場合 refining margins incorporate carbon costs, ...における重複利益 unpriced 排出 弱まる.
Per-refinery 排出 and trade-flow disclosure. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) climate disclosure requirements extend to financial flows. Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. Petrochemical refining inherently emits. However, Singapore's investment in sustainable aviation fuel and green hydrogen can reduce システム依存性 over time.

i: NEA (National Environment Agency) — 環境 regulator. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) — financial regulator with expanding climate disclosure mandate. SGX — Singapore Exchange, requires climate reporting.
Jurong Island — Singapore's petrochemical hub hosting Shell, ExxonMobil, and other major refineries. DBS, OCBC, UOB — Singapore's three major banks with significant fossil fuel financing exposure.
EMA (Energy Market Authority) — エネルギー規制当局. Singapore Green Plan 2030 — national sustainability framework. Carbon tax administered by NEA under Carbon Pricing Act.

Parliament of Singapore — unicameral. Singapore is a 議院内閣制 republic with dominant-party governance (PAP — People's Action Party). Note: limited political pluralism in practice. International channels: ASEAN (founding member), IMO, UNFCCC.

SI.s: Small EU加盟国 経済 ($73B GDP). 製造業がGDPの 19.4% GDP. サービス業がGDPの 57.9%. Significant forest cover (60%+ of territory). EU加盟国 since 2004. Former Yugoslav republic with strong 環境 awareness.

sectors.w: Slovenia's intensive agriculture in lowland areas (Pomurje, Podravje) relies on monoculture grain and livestock. ...の場合 soil and water quality data is linked to CAP payments, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme implementation. ...の場合 subsidy payments require biodiversity and soil health measures, ...における重複利益 exhaustive monoculture 弱まる.
Per-farm soil and water quality monitoring through ARSKTRP (Agency for Agricultural Markets and Rural 策定するment). Wを計算可能にする.

部分的に破壊可能. Grain monoculture and intensive livestock farming degrade soil and pollute groundwater. Organic farming and crop rotation reduce dependence — Slovenia already has 11%+ organic farming share.

Slovenia's agricultural sector is dominated by small family farms (average 7 hectares). Kmetijsko gozdarska zbornica (Chamber of Agriculture and Forestry) — industry association.
ARSKTRP (Agencija za kmetijske trge in razvoj podeželja) — manages CAP payments. Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Food — policy ministry.
Državni zbor (National Assembly) — 90 members. Državni svet (National Council) — 40 members, advisory role. EU加盟国 since 2004. Alpine Convention member. Contact through dz-rs.si.

SK.s: Central European EU加盟国 ($140.9B GDP). 製造業がGDPの 16.3% GDP — heavily auto-dependent (Volkswagen, Kia, Stellantis). サービス業がGDPの 60%. EU加盟国 since 2004. World's largest per-capita car producer.

sectors.w: Slovakia's food processing industry produces significant ultra-processed food for regional markets. ...の場合 per-product health impact data (obesity, diabetes correlations) is disclosed alongside marketing spend, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: EU front-of-pack labeling (Nutri-Score or equivalent). ...の場合 consumers can identify ultra-processing, ...における重複利益 opaque ingredient lists 弱まる.
Mandatory per-product health impact disclosure. Slovakia has rising obesity rates (20%+). Linking UPF consumption data to health outcomes makes W computable.
破壊不可能. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value and adds synthetic additives.

Slovakia's food retail is dominated by international chains (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco, Billa). Slovenská poľnohospodárska a potravinárska komora — food industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — oversees dietary health policy. Ministry of Agriculture and Rural 策定するment — food production policy.
Národná rada Slovenskej republiky (National Council) — unicameral, 150 members. EU加盟国 since 2004. Contact through nrsr.sk.

SN.s: West African 経済 ($32.8B GDP). 農業がGDPの 16.6% GDP. Mining 2.9% (phosphates, gold, zircon). Offshore oil and gas discoveries (Sangomar field — first oil expected). 水産業 crucial for food security. Democracy with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Senegal's fisheries face severe 乱獲 by foreign industrial fleets (EU, China) competing with artisanal pirogues. ...の場合 per-vessel catch data is published alongside stock assessments, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: 改革する fishing access agreements to limit foreign industrial fleet catch. ...の場合 EU and Chinese DWF (Distant Water Fleet) quotas reflect stock sustainability, ...における重複利益 乱獲 弱まる.
VMS (Vessel Monitoring System) data publication and per-vessel catch reporting. Senegal has invested in MCS (Monitoring, Control and Surveillance). Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. Industrial trawling damages benthic habitats. Artisanal fishing with selective gear reduces システム依存性.

i: DPSP — fisheries protection directorate. CNSP — national fisheries surveillance center, operates patrol vessels. Senegal has one of West Africa's most developed fisheries monitoring systems.
Senegal's fisheries employ ~600,000 people. Artisanal pirogues (wooden boats) land ~80% of total catch. GAIPES — fish exporters association.
Ministry of 水産業 and Maritime Economy. CRODT — oceanographic research center providing stock assessments. CSRP — sub-regional fisheries commission for West Africa.

Assemblée nationale du Sénégal — unicameral, 165 members. Senegal is a presidential republic with a strong democratic tradition (peaceful power transitions in 2000, 2012, 2024). Contact through assemblee-nationale.sn.

SO.s: Fragile state ($12B GDP). Limited economic data available. 森林レント 11.24% GDP (charcoal — major 森林破壊 driver). Charcoal trade linked to Al-Shabaab financing. Ongoing conflict and state fragility.

sectors.w: Somalia's charcoal production devastates acacia forests and finances armed groups. ...の場合 charcoal trade flows are traced and linked to 森林破壊 data, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: UN Security Council charcoal export ban enforcement (Resolution 2036). ...の場合 the ban is effectively enforced, the 重複利益 between Al-Shabaab revenue and charcoal trade 弱まる.
Satellite 森林破壊 monitoring linked to charcoal trade routes. UN Monitoring Group has documented the flows. Wを計算可能にする.
破壊不可能. Charcoal production from slow-growing acacia in arid Somali climate causes irreversible desertification.

Somali charcoal is primarily exported to Gulf states via dhow networks. UAE has been the largest market. Some companies are promoting LPG as an alternative cooking fuel.
Federal Government of Somalia — limited authority outside Mogadishu. Federal Member States have varying governance capacity. UN 制裁 framework provides the primary regulatory tool.

Federal Parliament of Somalia — bicameral: House of the People (275 members) and Upper House (54 members). Note: clan-based indirect elections, limited institutional capacity. International channels: UN, AU (ATMIS — AU Transition Mission in Somalia), IGAD.

SV.s: Small Central American 経済 ($35.4B GDP). サービス業がGDPの 61% GDP. 農業がGDPの 4.4%. 製造業がGDPの 12%. Significant remittance dependence (~24% of GDP). Bitcoin adopted as legal tender (2021). State of exception since 2022.

sectors.w: El Salvador's sugarcane monoculture in coastal lowlands is linked to chronic kidney disease of unknown etiology (CKDu) among agricultural workers — one of the highest rates globally. ...の場合 CKDu data is linked to agrochemical exposure per farm, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: Agrochemical regulation and worker health monitoring. ...の場合 sugarcane operations internalize CKDu health costs, ...における重複利益 unregulated pesticide/herbicide use 弱まる.
Per-farm agrochemical use and worker health outcome data. El Salvador has the world's highest CKDu mortality. Linking these datasets makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Sugarcane monoculture depletes soils and concentrates agrochemical exposure. Crop diversification and organic practices reduce システム依存性.

i: MARN — Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources. ISSS — social security institute. MAG — agriculture ministry. La Isla Network — international NGO documenting CKDu in Central America.
El Salvador's sugar industry is concentrated among a few large ingenios (sugar mills). CAMAGRO (Cámara Agropecuaria y Agroindustrial) — agricultural industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — responsible for CKDu response. MARN — 環境 regulation.
Asamblea Legislativa — unicameral, 84 members. Note: since 2021, executive dominance over legislature; limited separation of powers in practice. International channels: SICA, PAHO, ILO.

SY.s: War-devastated 経済 ($23.6B GDP). 農業がGDPの 43.1% GDP — unusually high due to industrial collapse. 石油レント 4.02%, gas 2.33%. Civil war since 2011 has destroyed infrastructure. Ongoing political transition (2024-2025).

sectors.w: Syria's oil infrastructure has been contested between factions (SDF/AANES controls northeastern fields, former regime controlled refineries). ...の場合 oil revenue flows are transparently traced through reconstruction, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: Post-conflict transparent governance of oil revenues. ...の場合 reconstruction frameworks require accountable revenue management, ...における重複利益 opaque extraction 弱まる.
Oil revenue flow 透明性 as condition of reconstruction assistance and 制裁 relief. Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. Oil infrastructure has been extensively damaged — reconstruction offers opportunity to build in 環境 standards.

Pre-war: Syrian Petroleum Company (state oil company). Current: fragmented control over oil infrastructure.
Regulatory capacity must be rebuilt as part of political transition.

Note: Syria is undergoing political transition following the fall of the Assad regime (late 2024). New governance structures are forming. International channels: UN (Security Council, Special Envoy), Arab League (membership restored 2023), reconstruction donor conferences.

TD.s: Sahelian 経済 ($19.5B GDP). 石油レント 16.75% GDP. 農業がGDPの 37.7%. 森林レント 4.58%. One of the world's poorest countries. Military transitional government. Lake Chad shrinking (~90% since 1960s).

sectors.w: Chad's oil revenues flow through an opaque pipeline (Doba basin to Kribi, Cameroon). The World Bank's original revenue 透明性 mechanism (Collège de Contrôle) was dismantled. ...の場合 oil revenue allocation is made transparent, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: Restore oil revenue 透明性 mechanisms. The World Bank's original Chad-Cameroon pipeline project required transparent revenue allocation — this was dismantled. Rebuilding it breaks ...における重複利益 opaque revenue flows.
Oil revenue flow disclosure through EITI. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023 for governance failures. Restoring compliance makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Oil production in arid Sahel strains water resources. However, the Doba basin fields are maturing and production declining.

CNPC — operates major oil fields after acquiring former ExxonMobil assets. Savannah Energy — British company that acquired former Chevron assets. Chad-Cameroon pipeline — 1,070 km pipeline to Atlantic coast.
SHT — state oil company. Ministry of Petroleum, Mines and Energy — oversees hydrocarbons. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023.

Note: Military transitional government (Conseil Militaire de Transition, succeeded by elected government of Mahamat Déby, 2024). Conseil National de Transition — 93 members, appointed. International channels: AU, Lake Chad Basin Commission, CEMAC.

TG.s: Small West African 経済 ($10.7B GDP). 農業がGDPの 21.3% GDP. Mining 4.88% (phosphates — world's 5th largest producer). サービス業がGDPの 49.2%. Key transit port (Lomé). Governance concerns with limited political competition.

sectors.w: Togo's phosphate 鉱業 (SNPT — Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) generates cadmium-contaminated waste. ...の場合 鉱山ごとの 環境 data is published, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: International cadmium standards in phosphate products. ...の場合 export markets require cadmium limits, ...における重複利益 unprocessed phosphate extraction 弱まる.
Per-mine 環境 monitoring data including cadmium levels, water contamination, and land rehabilitation. Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. Phosphate rock contains cadmium. Cadmium removal technology exists and is commercially viable.

i: ANGE — national 環境 management agency. ITIE-Togo — Togo is an EITI candidate country.
SNPT (Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) — the state phosphate company, privatized then renationalized. Operates mines in the Hahotoé-Kpogamé region.
Ministry of Mines and Energy — 鉱業 oversight. ANGE — 環境 assessment authority.

Assemblée nationale du Togo — 113 members. Note: Togo has been governed by the Gnassingbé family since 1967; limited political competition. Constitutional change in 2024 shifted to 議院内閣制 system. International channels: ECOWAS, AU, EITI.

TH.s: Major Southeast Asian 経済 ($526.5B GDP). 製造業がGDPの 24.3% GDP (automotive, electronics, food processing). 農業がGDPの 8.7%. サービス業がGDPの 59.2%. World's largest rice exporter. Significant petrochemical sector. Constitutional monarchy.

sectors.w: Thailand is a major UPF producer and exporter (CP Group — Charoen Pokphand — is one of Asia's largest food conglomerates). ...の場合 per-product health impact data is linked to marketing and formulation, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: Front-of-pack labeling reform. Thailand's existing traffic-light label (GDA) covers some nutrients — extending to ultra-processing indicators 弱まる ...における重複利益 opaque formulation.
Per-product health outcome correlation data. Thailand's rising obesity and diabetes rates can be linked to UPF consumption patterns. Wを計算可能にする.
破壊不可能. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value.

i: Thai FDA — regulates food safety and labeling. ThaiHealth (สำนักงานกองทุนสนับสนุนการสร้างเสริมสุขภาพ) — independent health promotion agency funded by a 2% surcharge on tobacco and alcohol taxes.
CP Group — one of the world's largest agri-food conglomerates. Thai Union — global seafood company (owner of Chicken of the Sea). Thai Beverage (ThaiBev) — major food and beverage company.
Ministry of Public Health — health policy. Thai FDA — food regulation. Thailand's sugar tax (2017) is one of the region's most progressive.
รัฐสภา (National Assembly) — bicameral: สภาผู้แทนราษฎร (House of Representatives, 500 members) and วุฒิสภา (Senate, 200 members). Thailand is a 立憲君主制. Recent democratic restoration (2023 elections).

TJ.s: Poorest Central Asian 経済 ($14.2B GDP). Mining 7.09% GDP (gold, silver, antimony). 農業がGDPの 19.7%. Aluminum smelting (TALCO). Remittance-dependent (~30% of GDP from Russia). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Tajikistan's 鉱業 sector includes artisanal gold 鉱業 with mercury use and the TALCO aluminum smelter (one of Central Asia's largest polluters). ...の場合 per-facility 排出 and 環境 data are published, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: International buyer due diligence on Tajik mineral exports. ...の場合 aluminum and gold buyers require 環境 compliance verification, ...における重複利益 unregulated production 弱まる.
Per-facility 環境 monitoring data. TALCO's fluoride 排出 and gold 鉱業 mercury contamination can be measured and disclosed. Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. TALCO smelter 排出 can be reduced with modern pot-lining and scrubbing technology. Mercury-free gold processing exists.

TALCO — state aluminum company, one of the world's largest smelters. Operates in Tursunzoda (formerly Regar). Gold 鉱業 includes both industrial and artisanal operations.
Committee for Environmental Protection under the Government — 環境 regulator. Ministry of Industry and New Technologies — industrial oversight.
Majlisi Oli (Parliament) — bicameral: Majlisi Namoyandagon (lower, 63 members) and Majlisi Milli (upper, 33 members). Note: effectively 一党独裁国家 (PDPT). International channels: OSCE, SCO, EITI.

TM.s: Gas-dependent closed 経済 ($51.4B GDP). 製造業がGDPの 18% GDP. One of the world's most 権威主義 states. Massive gas reserves (Galkynysh — world's 2nd largest gas field). Data extremely limited — World Bank reports zeros for many indicators due to government opacity.

sectors.w: Turkmenistan is one of the world's largest methane emitters — satellite monitoring (Sentinel-5P, MethaneSAT) has revealed massive methane leaks from gas infrastructure. ...の場合 methane data is published, Wが計算可能になる despite government opacity.
bp: Satellite-based methane monitoring bypasses government opacity. ...の場合 buyers (China — CNPC pipeline) face pressure to account for upstream methane, ...における重複利益 unmonitored gas production 弱まる.
Satellite methane emission monitoring (UNEP's IMEO — International Methane Emissions Observatory — has flagged Turkmenistan). Wを計算可能にする without government cooperation.
破壊不可能. Gas production and transport inherently leak methane, a greenhouse gas 80× more potent than CO₂ over 20 years.
a: Report through international channels only — no domestic 市民社会 exists

i: Note: Turkmenistan is one of the world's most closed societies. No independent 市民社会, media, or judiciary exists. Crude Accountability — international NGO documenting 環境 issues in the Caspian region. Turkmen.news — exile media.
Türkmengaz — state gas company. Türkmennebit — state oil company. CNPC — operates the Central Asia-China gas pipeline (Turkmenistan is the primary source). No independent corporate governance exists.
No independent domestic regulation exists. International monitoring provides the only oversight: UNEP IMEO, IEA Methane Tracker, satellite platforms (MethaneSAT, Sentinel-5P).

Mejlis (Parliament) — 125 members. Turkmenistan is an 権威主義 state — the legislature has no independent function. International channels: UN (UNEP, OHCHR), OSCE, CIS. Turkmenistan maintains permanent neutrality status (UN-recognized since 1995).

TN.s: North African 経済 ($51.3B GDP). 農業がGDPの 9.7% GDP. 石油レント 1.55%. 製造業がGDPの 14.8%. サービス業がGDPの 62.6%. Birthplace of the Arab Spring (2011). Governance backsliding since 2021 presidential power consolidation.

sectors.w: Tunisia's oil and gas production is modest but state oil company ETAP's revenue flows lack 透明性. ...の場合 油田ごとの 環境 and revenue data is published, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: EITI-aligned revenue 透明性. Tunisia's oil revenues are small relative to GDP but significant for the state budget. Transparent allocation breaks ...における重複利益 opaque revenue management.
Per-field 環境 monitoring and revenue flow disclosure. Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. Tunisia's mature fields are declining. Solar energy potential is enormous (Saharan irradiance) and can reduce hydrocarbon dependence.
a: に報告する： ANPE (Agence Nationale de Protection de l'Environnement)
を通じて文書化する： Tunisian 環境 organizations (FTDES — Forum Tunisien pour les Droits Économiques et Sociaux)
Report through ETAP compliance channels

に投資する solar energy transition
International partners (ENI, OMV): Apply home-country ESG standards to Tunisian operations
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy: 実施する hydrocarbon revenue 透明性
ANPE: 強化する 環境 monitoring at production sites
ANME (Agence Nationale pour la Maîtrise de l'Énergie): Accelerate 再生可能エネルギー targets
Engage through available 議院内閣制 channels — Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple (161 members); note limited legislative independence under current governance
Support EU-Tunisia cooperation on energy transition

i: ANPE — 環境 protection agency. FTDES — Tunisian economic and social rights forum, active on 環境 justice. Tunisia has relatively active 市民社会 despite recent governance concerns.
ETAP — state oil company. ENI (Italy), OMV (Austria) — major international operators in Tunisia. Tunisia's South Energy Transition Program targets renewable expansion.
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy — hydrocarbons oversight. ANME — energy efficiency and 再生可能エネルギー agency.

Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple — unicameral, 161 members. Note: since 2021, presidential power consolidation has weakened legislative independence. International channels: Arab League, AU, Union for the Mediterranean.

TR.s: Major middle-income 経済 ($1,359.1B GDP). 製造業がGDPの 16.8% GDP. サービス業がGDPの 57.5%. NATO member. Mining 0.63%. 農業がGDPの 5.8%. Significant coal dependence for electricity. G20 member.

sectors.w: Türkiye is expanding coal capacity (including imported coal plants) despite having excellent renewable potential. ...の場合 coal plant health costs are internalized, ...における重複利益 cheap coal power breaks.
bp: Carbon pricing or coal plant emission standards aligned with EU CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism). Türkiye's EU customs union makes CBAM relevant to industrial exports. ...の場合 coal costs include carbon, renewables are cheaper.
Per-plant 排出 and health cost data. Türkiye's coal plants are concentrated near population centers. HEAL and local NGOs have documented health costs. Wを計算可能にする.
破壊不可能. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: に報告する： ÇŞB (Çevre, Şehircilik ve İklim Değişikliği Bakanlığı — Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change)

Report through Greenpeace Mediterranean Turkey office

i: ÇŞB — environment ministry. TEMA Vakfı — major Turkish 環境 NGO focused on soil and forest protection. Greenpeace Mediterranean — active in Türkiye on coal campaigns.
EÜAŞ — state electricity generation company. Significant private coal generation. Türkiye's 2053 net-zero target implies eventual coal phase-out but no timeline exists.
EPDK — energy market regulator. Türkiye ratified the Paris Agreement in 2021. EU Customs Union makes CBAM compliance relevant for Turkish industrial exports.

TBMM (Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi — Grand National Assembly) — unicameral, 600 members. Contact through tbmm.gov.tr. Türkiye is a presidential republic, NATO member, G20 member, EU customs union partner.

TT.s: Caribbean energy 経済 ($25.6B GDP). ガスレント 5.09%, oil rents 2.71% GDP. Major petrochemical and LNG producer (Atlantic LNG). 製造業がGDPの 14.4%. サービス業がGDPの 59.2%. Parliamentary 民主主義.

sectors.w: Trinidad's petrochemical industry faces maturing gas fields and declining production. As reserves deplete and global LNG competition increases, ...における重複利益 fossil fuel dependence 弱まる naturally.
bp: Declining natural gas reserves force economic diversification. ...の場合 production costs rise on mature fields, ...における重複利益 fossil fuel dependence 弱まる as alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-facility 排出 and 環境 monitoring at Point Lisas industrial estate and Atlantic LNG. Wを計算可能にする.
破壊不可能. LNG and petrochemical processing emit CO₂ and other pollutants.

に報告する： MEEI (Ministry of Energy and Energy Industries)

MEEI: 策定する 再生可能エネルギー framework

i: EMA — the Environmental Management Authority, established under the Environmental Management Act 2000. Fishermen and Friends of the Sea — Trinidad's most active 環境 NGO.
NGC (National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago) — state gas company. Atlantic LNG — joint venture (Shell, BP, NGC). Point Lisas Industrial Estate — petrochemical complex.
MEEI — energy ministry. RIC — utilities regulator. Trinidad has extremely low domestic energy prices (subsidized), discouraging efficiency.
Parliament of Trinidad and Tobago — bicameral: House of Representatives (41 members) and Senate (31 members). Parliamentary 民主主義 with competitive elections. Contact through ttparliament.org.

TZ.s: East African 経済 ($78.8B GDP). 農業がGDPの 23.3% GDP. Mining 4.03% (gold, tanzanite — found only in Tanzania). 森林レント 2.39%. Gas reserves (offshore). サービス業がGDPの 29.6%. Growing 経済 with improving governance.

sectors.w: Tanzania's gold 鉱業 (Barrick/Twiga Minerals, AngloGold Ashanti) generates tailings and mercury contamination (artisanal sector). ...の場合 鉱山ごとの 環境 data is published alongside revenue, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: Mining Act 2017 local content and 透明性 requirements. ...の場合 enforced alongside 環境 monitoring, ...における重複利益 opaque extraction 弱まる.
Per-mine 環境 monitoring data through TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative). Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. Mercury-free artisanal 鉱業 and improved tailings management reduce システム依存性.

i: NEMC — 環境当局. Mining Commission — 鉱業 sector regulator. LEAT — Tanzanian 環境 law NGO. HakiRasilimali (Publish What You Pay Tanzania) — revenue 透明性 advocacy.

Twiga Minerals — 50/50 joint venture between Barrick Gold and Government of Tanzania (created after 2017 tax dispute). Geita Gold Mine — AngloGold Ashanti operation. STAMICO (State Mining Corporation) — government 鉱業 entity.
Mining Commission — established under Mining Act 2017. TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member since 2009.

Bunge la Tanzania (National Assembly) — unicameral, 393 members. Tanzania is a presidential republic with increasing political openness under current administration. Contact through bunge.go.tz. EAC (East African Community) member.

UA.s: War-affected 経済 ($190.7B GDP). Mining 5.32% GDP. 軍事費 34.48% GDP (wartime). 農業がGDPの 7.1%. Coal 0.34%. EU加盟候補国 country (2022). Under Russian invasion since February 2022. Massive 環境 damage from war.

sectors.w: Ukraine's 鉱業 sector (iron ore, manganese, titanium) has suffered massive 環境 damage from the Russian invasion — flooded mines, destroyed infrastructure, contaminated land. Post-war reconstruction offers opportunity for transparent 環境 standards. ...の場合 reconstruction 環境 data is published, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: EU accession conditionality requiring 環境 standards in post-war reconstruction. ...の場合 reconstruction adheres to EU 環境 acquis, ...における重複利益 rapid but dirty rebuilding 弱まる.
Environmental damage assessment and remediation tracking. Ukraine's Ministry of Environmental Protection is already documenting war damage with international support. Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes, but post-war reconstruction can implement best-practice tailings management and water treatment from the start.

Reconstruction companies: 採用する green building and 環境 remediation standards

i: Derzhekoinspektsiia — State Environmental Inspectorate. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources — documents war-related 環境 damage. Ecodozor — citizen reporting platform.
Metinvest — Ukraine's largest steel and 鉱業 group (Rinat Akhmetov). ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih — major steel producer. Ferrexpo — iron ore pellet producer.
Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources. State Subsoil Service (Derzhgeonadra) — 鉱業 licensing. Ukraine's EU candidacy requires 環境 acquis alignment.

Verkhovna Rada — unicameral, 450 members. Contact through rada.gov.ua. EU加盟候補国 country since 2022. International channels: EU accession process, Ukraine Recovery Conference, International Criminal Court (環境 damage documentation).

UG.s: East African 経済 ($53.9B GDP). 農業がGDPの 24.6% GDP. 森林レント 7.48% (one of the highest in the dataset). Oil production beginning (Tilenga and Kingfisher projects, EACOP pipeline). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Uganda's new oil projects (TotalEnergies' Tilenga and CNOOC's Kingfisher, plus EACOP — East African Crude Oil Pipeline) face massive international scrutiny. ...の場合 project-level 環境 data is published, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: International ESG pressure on project financiers. ...の場合 banks and insurers withdraw from EACOP financing, ...における重複利益 unscrutinized pipeline construction 弱まる. Several major banks have already declined.
Per-project 環境 impact data for Tilenga (in Murchison Falls National Park), Kingfisher, and EACOP. Wを計算可能にする.
破壊不可能. Crude oil production and 1,443-km heated pipeline through sensitive ecosystems inherently create 環境 risk.
a: に報告する： NEMA (National Environment Management Authority)
を通じて文書化する： international 環境 organizations (350.org, BankTrack)

i: NEMA — 環境当局. Note: Ugandan 環境 activists have faced government harassment. International channels are safer: 350.org has led the #StopEACOP campaign. BankTrack monitors EACOP financing.

TotalEnergies — operator of Tilenga project and EACOP. CNOOC Uganda — operates Kingfisher project. EACOP (East African Crude Oil Pipeline) — 1,443 km from Hoima to Tanga (Tanzania). UNOC (Uganda National Oil Company) — state oil company.
PAU — petroleum sector regulator. MEMD — energy and mineral development ministry. Uganda's Petroleum Revenue Management policy is under development.

Parliament of Uganda — unicameral, 529 members. Note: Uganda is effectively under one-party dominant governance (NRM). International channels: EAC (East African Community), African Court on Human and Peoples' Rights, European Parliament (regarding EU-headquartered companies like TotalEnergies).

UY.s: Small South American 経済 ($81B GDP). 農業がGDPの 6.4% GDP. サービス業がGDPの 65.3%. 森林レント 1.91%. Generates nearly 100% of electricity from renewables (wind, hydro, solar, biomass). Strong 民主主義 — one of Latin America's most stable.

sectors.w: Uruguay's soy and eucalyptus monoculture expansion is degrading soils and displacing native grasslands (campos). ...の場合 soil health and biodiversity data is linked to agricultural production per department, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: National soil conservation plan enforcement. Uruguay's Ley de Uso y Conservación de Suelos (Soil Use and Conservation Law) requires mandatory soil plans — strengthening enforcement breaks ...における重複利益 soil-exhaustive monoculture.
Per-farm soil erosion and grassland conversion monitoring. MGAP already requires Plan de Uso y Manejo de Suelos for farms >50 ha. Publishing compliance data makes W computable.
部分的に破壊可能. Soy monoculture and eucalyptus plantations degrade native grassland ecosystems. Integrated crop-livestock systems and native grassland preservation reduce システム依存性.
a: に報告する： DINAMA (Dirección Nacional de Medio Ambiente)
に報告する： RENARE (Dirección General de Recursos Naturales Renovables)

Support Mercosur 環境 cooperation frameworks
Advocate for native grassland (campos) conservation in international biodiversity frameworks

i: DINAMA — national environment directorate. RENARE — renewable natural resources directorate under MGAP. Vida Silvestre Uruguay — biodiversity conservation organization.
UPM (Finnish company) — major eucalyptus plantation and pulp mill operator. Montes del Plata (UPM/Arauco) — forestry. Large-scale soy farming often by Brazilian/Argentine operators.
MGAP — agriculture, livestock and fisheries ministry. INIA — national agricultural research institute.
Asamblea General — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (99 members) and Cámara de Senadores (30 members). Contact through parlamento.gub.uy. Uruguay is one of Latin America's strongest democracies.

UZ.s: Central Asian 経済 ($115B GDP). ガスレント 11.04% GDP. Mining 8.5% (gold — Muruntau is world's largest open-pit gold mine, uranium). 農業がGDPの 18.3%. 製造業がGDPの 20.2%. Post-Karimov liberalization (since 2016).

sectors.w: Uzbekistan's gas sector (Uzbekneftegaz) consumes most production domestically at heavily subsidized prices, encouraging waste. ...の場合 油田ごとの production and domestic consumption data is published, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: Gas price reform eliminating subsidies that encourage wasteful consumption. ...の場合 domestic gas prices reflect market value, ...における重複利益 underpriced energy 弱まる.
Per-field production, distribution, and consumption data. Uzbekistan has begun EITI implementation. Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. Gas combustion emits CO₂. However, Uzbekistan's enormous solar potential (300+ sunny days/year) can displace gas in electricity generation.
a: に報告する： State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection
Report through EITI Uzbekistan channels

Reduce methane leakage from gas infrastructure

Support EITI enhanced reporting with 環境 data

i: State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection (Goskomekologiya) — 環境 regulator. EITI Uzbekistan — Uzbekistan became an EITI member in 2021.
Uzbekneftegaz — state gas company. NMMC (Navoi Mining and Metallurgical Company) — operates Muruntau gold mine (world's largest open-pit) and uranium mines. Almalyk MMC — copper and gold 鉱業.
Ministry of Energy — energy policy. Goskomekologiya — 環境 regulation. Uzbekistan has been implementing significant economic reforms since 2016.

Oliy Majlis — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (Qonunchilik palatasi, 150 members) and Senate, 100 members. Note: limited political pluralism. International channels: EITI, EBRD, ADB, SCO. Aral Sea 環境 disaster requires international cooperation.

VE.s: Oil-dependent 経済 in crisis ($119.8B GDP — severely contracted from peak). World's largest proven oil reserves. Economic data largely unavailable (World Bank reports zeros for most indicators). Hyperinflation, mass emigration. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Venezuela's oil industry has collapsed from ~3.3M bpd (1990s) to ~700K bpd due to mismanagement, underinvestment, and 制裁. The 重複利益 is already weakened by operational failure.
bp: Production collapse has already weakened the 重複利益 — PDVSA lacks the capital and technical capacity to maintain production. Sanctions further constrain revenue.
Oil revenue 透明性 is impossible under current governance opacity. However, international 制裁 monitoring (OFAC designations) provides partial W computability.
破壊不可能. Oil extraction and refining emit CO₂. Venezuela's heavy crude (Orinoco Belt) is particularly 排出-intensive to process.
a: Report through international channels (Transparencia Venezuela, PROVEA)

Provide data to international 制裁 enforcement authorities

Support post-transition EITI membership planning
i: Note: No independent domestic institutions exist. Transparencia Venezuela — anti-corruption NGO. PROVEA — Venezuelan human rights organization. Operating environment is extremely hostile to 市民社会.
PDVSA (Petróleos de Venezuela, S.A.) — state oil company, severely degraded operationally. Chevron — received limited US OFAC license to operate. Repsol, ENI — maintain limited presence.

No independent domestic regulation exists. OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control, US Treasury) — administers Venezuela 制裁. EU — maintains 制裁. PDVSA is both regulator and operator — no separation exists.

Asamblea Nacional — 277 members. Note: Venezuela's institutions lack independence under current governance. International channels: OAS (Venezuela withdrawn/suspended), International Contact Group, ICC preliminary examination, Lima Group (reduced activity).

VN.s: Fast-growing 経済 ($476.4B GDP). 製造業がGDPの 24.4% GDP. 農業がGDPの 11.9%. 石炭レント 0.38%. Oil 0.67%. 森林レント 1.07%. Major electronics and textile manufacturing hub. One-party state (Communist Party).

sectors.w: Viet Nam is rapidly expanding coal power capacity despite excellent renewable potential (solar, wind, offshore wind). JETP (Just Energy Transition Partnership) funding ($15.5B pledged) creates leverage to shift the 重複利益 away from coal.
bp: JETP implementation — $15.5B pledged by international partners for coal-to-renewables transition. ...の場合 JETP funding makes renewables cheaper than new coal, ...における重複利益 coal expansion breaks.
Per-plant 排出 and health cost data. Viet Nam's coal plants are concentrated in the north (Quảng Ninh) and south (Bình Thuận). Wを計算可能にする.
破壊不可能. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.

i: MONRE — environment and natural resources ministry. VUSTA — umbrella organization for Vietnamese 市民社会 (within party framework). Note: independent 市民社会 is not permitted in Viet Nam's one-party system.

EVN (Tập đoàn Điện lực Việt Nam) — state electricity utility. PVN (PetroVietnam) — state oil and gas company. TKV (Vinacomin — Tập đoàn Công nghiệp Than - Khoáng sản Việt Nam) — state coal 鉱業 company.

MOIT — energy and industrial policy. PDP VIII (Power 策定するment Plan VIII, approved 2023) — sets 再生可能エネルギー targets. JETP — Just Energy Transition Partnership ($15.5B pledged by IPG partners including US, EU, UK, Japan).

Quốc hội (National Assembly) — unicameral, 500 members. Viet Nam is a 一党独裁国家 (Communist Party). JETP International Partners Group provides the primary leverage mechanism. International channels: ASEAN, World Bank, ADB, JETP IPG.

XK.s: Small Western Balkan 経済 ($11.2B GDP). 製造業がGDPの 12.6%. 石炭レント 0.38%. Mining 0.55%. 農業がGDPの 7.3%. Youngest population in Europe. EU加盟候補国 status pending. Two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A and B) supply ~95% of electricity.

sectors.w: Kosovo's near-total dependence on two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A — one of Europe's worst polluters — and Kosovo B) faces EU accession conditionality and enormous health costs.
bp: EU accession pathway requiring IED/LCPD compliance. Kosovo A is scheduled for decommissioning. ...の場合 環境 compliance costs are applied, new renewables are cheaper than coal retrofit.
Per-plant 排出 and health cost data. Kosovo A and B cause severe air pollution in Pristina — among Europe's worst air quality. Wを計算可能にする.
破壊不可能. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: に報告する： AMMK (Agjencia për Mbrojtjen e Mjedisit të Kosovës — Kosovo Environmental Protection Agency)
を通じて文書化する： INDEP or GAP Institute (Kosovo think tanks)
Report through KEK compliance channels
KEK (Korporata Energjetike e Kosovës): Plan Kosovo A decommissioning and Kosovo B modernization or replacement
に投資する solar and wind capacity
実施する just transition plans for Obiliq/Kastriot 鉱業 communities
ERO (Energy Regulatory Office): 改革する tariffs to incentivize renewable investment
MMPH (Ministry of Environment): 施行する emission standards
Energy Community Secretariat: Hold Kosovo accountable for compliance
あなたの代表者に連絡してください： Deputet in the Kuvendi i Kosovës (120 members) を要求する Kosovo A decommissioning timeline and 再生可能エネルギー investment
Support EU integration benchmarks on 環境 standards
を通じて提唱する： Energy Community for just transition support
を推進する： World Bank and EBRD financing of 再生可能エネルギー replacement
i: AMMK — 環境 protection agency. INDEP (Institute for 策定するment Policy) — research and advocacy. GAP Institute — Kosovo public policy think tank.
KEK — Kosovo Energy Corporation, 国有, operates Kosovo A (5 units, 800 MW, built 1962-1975) and Kosovo B (2 units, 678 MW, built 1983-1984). KOSTT — transmission system operator.
ERO — エネルギー規制当局. MMPH (Ministria e Mjedisit, Planifikimit Hapësinor dhe Infrastrukturës) — environment ministry. Kosovo is an Energy Community Treaty member.

Kuvendi i Kosovës (Assembly of Kosovo) — unicameral, 120 members. Contact through kuvendikosoves.org. Kosovo declared independence in 2008 (recognized by ~100 UN members). Energy Community Treaty member.

ZA.s: Largest sub-Saharan 経済 ($401.1B GDP). 石炭レント 2.44% GDP. Mining 3.83% (gold, platinum group metals, chrome, manganese). 製造業がGDPの 12.8%. サービス業がGDPの 63%. Constitutional 民主主義. Severe electricity crisis (load shedding).

sectors.w: South Africa generates ~80% of electricity from coal (Eskom's aging fleet). JETP funding ($8.5B pledged) and Eskom's operational crisis (load shedding) create dual pressure. ...の場合 coal plant health costs are internalized, the 重複利益 breaks.
bp: JETP implementation and Eskom restructuring. $8.5B pledged for coal-to-renewables transition. ...の場合 renewable IPPs are cheaper and more reliable than aging coal plants, ...における重複利益 coal dependence breaks.

Per-plant 排出, health costs, and reliability data. Eskom's coal fleet is extensively documented — multiple plants fail to meet South Africa's own emission standards (granted repeated postponements). Wを計算可能にする.
破壊不可能. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂. South Africa's coal is high-ash content, exacerbating particulate 排出.
a: に報告する： DFFE (Department of Forestry, 水産業 and the Environment)
Report through groundWork or Centre for Environmental Rights
を通じて文書化する： Public Protector complaints
Eskom: 実施する coal plant decommissioning schedule aligned with IRP 2019
Mining companies (Exxaro, Thungela, Seriti): 策定する coal transition plans
Renewable IPPs: Scale deployment to replace coal capacity
NERSA (National Energy Regulator): 改革する tariffs to reflect coal externalities
DFFE: 施行する Minimum Emission Standards without further postponements
DMRE (Department of Mineral Resources and Energy): Accelerate IRP 2019 renewable targets
あなたの代表者に連絡してください： Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (400 members) or NCOP (National Council of Provinces, 90 members) を要求する Eskom emission standard compliance
Support JETP implementation and accountability mechanisms
を通じて提唱する： BRICS for just energy transition principles
を推進する： climate finance delivery through Green Climate Fund
i: DFFE — the environment department. groundWork — South African 環境 justice organization. Centre for Environmental Rights — public interest 環境 law organization. Life After Coal campaign — coalition challenging Eskom's coal dependence.

Eskom — state electricity utility, operates 15 coal-fired power stations. Exxaro Resources — coal 鉱業. Thungela Resources — thermal coal (spun off from Anglo American). Seriti Resources — coal 鉱業. REIPPPP (Renewable Energy Independent Power Producer Procurement Programme) — auction program.
NERSA — エネルギー規制当局. DMRE — mineral resources and energy department. IRP 2019 (Integrated Resource Plan) — South Africa's electricity plan. JETP Investment Plan — guides $8.5B transition funding.

Parliament of South Africa — bicameral: National Assembly (400 members) and National Council of Provinces (90 members). Contact through parliament.gov.za. South Africa is a constitutional 民主主義, G20 member, BRICS member. JETP International Partners Group: France, Germany, UK, US, EU.

ZM.s: Southern African 経済 ($25.3B GDP). Mining 28.25% GDP — one of the highest 鉱業 dependencies globally (copper). 森林レント 6.78%. サービス業がGDPの 57.2%. Africa's second-largest copper producer. Democratic governance with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Zambia's copper 鉱業 generates acid mine drainage and SO₂ from smelting (Mopani, KCM — historically among Africa's worst polluters). ...の場合 鉱山ごとの 環境 data is published, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: Mining royalty reform with 環境 earmarking. ...の場合 鉱業 revenue is partly allocated to 環境 remediation, ...における重複利益 externalizing pollution costs 弱まる.
Per-mine 環境 monitoring data through ZEITI and ZEMA. Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. Copper smelting 排出 can be reduced with modern sulfuric acid capture technology. Mopani smelter upgrade demonstrates this.
a: に報告する： ZEMA (Zambia Environmental Management Agency)
を通じて文書化する： community organizations in Copperbelt Province
Report through 鉱業 company compliance channels
First Quantum Minerals (Kansanshi): 実施する international 環境 standards
Barrick Gold (Lumwana): 採用する enhanced tailings management
ZCCM-IH (state 鉱業 holding): Require 環境 compliance from partners
ZEMA: 施行する emission standards for copper smelters
Ministry of Mines: 強化する 環境 conditions in 鉱業 licenses
ZEITI: Expand to include 環境 data
あなたの代表者に連絡してください： Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (156 members) を要求する 環境 enforcement on the Copperbelt
Support EITI enhanced reporting with 環境 data
を通じて提唱する： SADC for regional 鉱業 環境 standards
を推進する： responsible mineral supply chain standards (copper is critical for energy transition)
i: ZEMA — 環境 management agency. Copperbelt communities have suffered decades of SO₂ and heavy metal pollution — documented by multiple studies and legal cases (e.g., Vedanta/KCM litigation in UK courts).

First Quantum Minerals — operates Kansanshi (one of Africa's largest copper mines) and Sentinel mines. Barrick Gold — operates Lumwana copper mine. Mopani Copper Mines — majority owned by ZCCM-IH after Glencore divestment. KCM (Konkola Copper Mines) — under provisional liquidation.
Ministry of Mines and Minerals 策定するment. ZEITI (Zambia Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member. Mining Cadastre Department — licensing authority.

National Assembly of Zambia — unicameral, 156 elected members + 8 nominated. Contact through parliament.gov.zm. Zambia is a presidential republic with competitive elections (peaceful transitions in 1991, 2011, 2021). SADC (Southern African 策定するment Community) member.

ZW.s: Southern African 経済 ($41.5B GDP). Mining 4.24% GDP (platinum group metals, gold, lithium, diamonds). 農業がGDPの 8.7%. 製造業がGDPの 15.6%. 森林レント 1.82%. Governance concerns. Major lithium reserves (Bikita, Arcadia).

sectors.w: Zimbabwe's 鉱業 sector is expanding rapidly (lithium — critical for EV batteries — and PGMs). ...の場合 鉱山ごとの 環境 data is published alongside revenue, Wが計算可能になる.
bp: International supply chain due diligence for critical minerals (lithium for EU Battery Regulation compliance). ...の場合 EU buyers require 環境 verification, ...における重複利益 unregulated extraction 弱まる.
Per-mine 環境 monitoring through ZEITI (Zimbabwe applied for EITI candidacy). Wを計算可能にする.
部分的に破壊可能. Lithium 鉱業 (hard-rock) generates waste rock and uses water. Best-practice processing and water recycling reduce システム依存性.
a: に報告する： EMA (Environmental Management Agency)
を通じて文書化する： ZELA (Zimbabwe Environmental Law Association)
Report through international 鉱業 company compliance channels
Zimplats (Impala Platinum): 実施する international 環境 standards
Prospect Lithium (Bikita Minerals): 採用する responsible lithium 鉱業 practices
Zim Integrated (Arcadia): Apply EU Battery Regulation-aligned 環境 standards
Ministry of Mines: 施行する 環境 conditions in 鉱業 licenses
EMA: 強化する 環境 impact assessment for lithium projects
ZMDC (Zimbabwe Mining 策定するment Corporation): Require 環境 compliance from joint venture partners
Engage through available 議院内閣制 channels — Parliament of Zimbabwe: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members); note limited political pluralism in practice
Support EU Battery Regulation supply chain due diligence requirements for Zimbabwean lithium
を通じて提唱する： SADC Mining Protocol for regional 環境 standards
を推進する： EITI membership to improve 鉱業 透明性
i: EMA — 環境 management agency. ZELA — 環境 law organization. Note: 市民社会 space is constrained in Zimbabwe.

Zimplats — Zimbabwe's largest PGM producer (Impala Platinum subsidiary). Bikita Minerals — lithium 鉱業 (Sinomine Resources acquired). Arcadia Lithium — major lithium deposit (Zhejiang Huayou Cobalt acquired). Caledonia Mining — gold.
Ministry of Mines and Mining 策定するment. EMA — 環境 regulation. ZMDC — state 鉱業 company. Zimbabwe's Mines and Minerals Act governs the sector.

Parliament of Zimbabwe — bicameral: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members). Note: ZANU-PF dominance limits effective legislative oversight. International channels: SADC, AU, EITI (Zimbabwe has expressed interest in joining).

CN.s: World's second-largest 経済 ($18,743.8B GDP). 製造業がGDPの 24.9% GDP — global factory floor. 石炭レント 0.61%. 工業がGDPの 36.5%. サービス業がGDPの 56.7%. One-party state (CPC). World's largest CO₂ emitter. Rapid renewable deployment alongside continued coal expansion.

sectors.w: China operates ~1,100 GW of coal capacity — more than the rest of the world combined. However, China also deploys more 再生可能エネルギー annually than any other country. ...の場合 renewable deployment makes new coal uneconomic, ...における重複利益 coal expansion breaks.
bp: Renewable energy cost competitiveness — China's solar and wind are already cheaper than new coal in most provinces. ...の場合 existing coal plants become more expensive to run than new renewables, the 重複利益 breaks. This is already happening in eastern provinces.
Per-plant 排出 data. China's national ETS (launched 2021) covers ~4.5 billion tonnes CO₂. Expanding coverage from electricity to industry sectors makes W computable.
破壊不可能. Coal combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury by chemistry.
a: に報告する： MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment, 生态环境部)
Report through provincial 環境 protection bureaus
を通じて文書化する： 12369 環境 complaint hotline
State energy companies (CHN Energy, Huaneng, Datang, Huadian, SPIC): Accelerate coal-to-renewables transition
Reduce new coal plant approvals
に投資する grid-scale storage to enable renewable integration
NEA (National Energy Administration, 国家能源局): Limit new coal approvals to replace-and-retire
MEE: Accelerate national ETS coverage expansion to cement, steel, aluminum
NDRC: Align electricity market reform with carbon reduction targets
Support US-China climate cooperation mechanisms (Sunnylands process)
を通じて提唱する： COP process for China's coal phase-down commitments
を推進する： national ETS carbon price to rise above marginal abatement cost
Support technology cooperation on CCS and grid-scale storage
i: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) — central 環境当局. 12369 hotline — 環境 complaint system receiving millions of reports annually. Provincial Environmental Protection Bureaus — local enforcement. IPE (Institute of Public & Environmental Affairs, 公众环境研究中心) — Ma Jun's NGO providing corporate 環境 data.

China's 'Big Five' power generators: CHN Energy (国家能源集团), China Huaneng (华能), China Datang (大唐), China Huadian (华电), SPIC (国家电投). All 国有, collectively operating most coal capacity. Also rapidly scaling renewables.

NEA (National Energy Administration) — energy planning and regulation. NDRC (National 策定するment and 改革する Commission, 国家发展和改革委员会) — economic planning, sets electricity prices. National ETS — world's largest carbon market by coverage (power sector).

National People's Congress (全国人民代表大会) — ~3,000 members. China is a 一党独裁国家 — the NPC does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: US-China climate bilateral, COP/UNFCCC, G20. China's dual carbon targets: peak CO₂ before 2030, carbon neutrality by 2060.

KR.s: Advanced 経済 ($1,875.4B GDP). 製造業がGDPの 26.6% GDP (semiconductors, automobiles, shipbuilding, petrochemicals). サービス業がGDPの 57.5%. Heavy energy import dependence. Fourth-largest coal importer globally. G20 member. Vibrant 民主主義.

sectors.w: South Korea operates ~37 GW of coal capacity and is the world's 4th-largest coal importer. The 10th Basic Plan for Electricity Supply and Demand targets coal phase-down. ...の場合 carbon pricing (K-ETS) makes coal uncompetitive versus LNG and renewables, the 重複利益 breaks.
bp: K-ETS (Korea Emissions Trading Scheme) carbon price escalation. ...の場合 carbon costs make coal-fired generation more expensive than LNG and renewables, ...における重複利益 coal dependence breaks.
Per-plant 排出 and health cost data. Korea Environment Institute and Korean medical associations have documented coal plant health impacts. Wを計算可能にする.
破壊不可能. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: に報告する： Ministry of Environment (환경부)
を通じて文書化する： KFEM (Korean Federation for Environmental Movements, 환경운동연합)
Report through KEPCO compliance channels
KEPCO (Korea Electric Power Corporation, 한국전력공사): 実施する coal retirement schedule aligned with NDC
POSCO: Scale hydrogen-based steelmaking (HyREX)
Samsung, SK, Hyundai: Expand renewable electricity procurement (RE100 commitments)
MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy, 산업통상자원부): Accelerate coal retirement in Basic Electricity Plan
Ministry of Environment: 強化する K-ETS carbon price floor
KPX (Korea Power Exchange): 改革する merit order to disadvantage coal
あなたの代表者に連絡してください： 국회의원 (Member of the National Assembly, 300 members) を要求する coal phase-out timeline in energy legislation
Support Powering Past Coal Alliance membership
を通じて提唱する： OECD for coal finance phase-out
を推進する： G20 commitment to end international coal financing (South Korea pledged to end overseas coal finance in 2021)
i: Ministry of Environment (환경부) — 環境当局. KFEM (환경운동연합) — South Korea's largest 環境 NGO. Solutions for Our Climate (기후솔루션) — climate policy advocacy organization.
KEPCO — state electricity company (subsidiary gencos operate coal plants). POSCO — steelmaker, major coal consumer. Samsung, SK Group, Hyundai — major conglomerates with growing RE100 commitments.
MOTIE — energy and industry ministry. K-ETS — Korea Emissions Trading Scheme (launched 2015, covers ~70% of national 排出). KPX (한국전력거래소) — electricity market operator.

국회 (National Assembly) — unicameral, 300 members. Contact through assembly.go.kr. South Korea is a presidential republic with competitive elections. G20 member, OECD member, Powering Past Coal Alliance member (joined 2021).
